विद्यालय शिक्षा क्षेत्र योजनाको समीक्षा बैठक
content: काठमाडौँ। शिक्षा तथा खेलकुद मन्त्रालयले विद्यालय शिक्षा क्षेत्र योजना ‘स्कुल एजुकेसन सेक्टर प्लान’(एसईएसपी) योजनाको समीक्षा बैठक प्रारम्भ गरेको छ। आगामी आवको बजेट निर्माणको प्रक्रिया चलिरहेको सन्दर्भमा मन्त्रालयले दातृनिकायहरूसँग सञ्चालित एसईएसपी कार्यक्रमको प्रगित तथा बजेट समीक्षा गर्दै आगामी दिनमा शिक्षा क्षेत्रमा लिनुपर्ने पहलकदमीबारे छलफल गरेको हो। पाँच दिनसम्म चल्ने बजेट समीक्षा बैठकमा शिक्षा मन्त्रालय, मन्त्रालयअन्तर्गतका शिक्षा तथा मानव स्रोत विकास केन्द्र, पाठ्यक्रम विकास केन्द्रलगायत विभिन्न निकाय तथा एसईएसपीमा सहयोग गर्ने विकास साझेदारहरूको सहभागिता छ। मन्त्रालयका सचिव चूडामणि पौडेलको अध्यक्षता सुरु भएको पहिलो दिनको बैठकमा विकास साझेदारको संयोजक युरोपेली संघ (ईयू) को नेतृत्वमा आठवटा संयुक्त साझेदार र अन्य विकास साझेदारहरू बेलायत, इयू, फिनल्यान्ड, नर्वे, संयुक्त राष्ट्रसंघीय नियोग (युनिसेफ), एसियाली विकास बैंक, विश्व बैंकलगायतको उपस्थिति थियो। उद्घाटन सत्रमा विभिन्न देशका राजदूत र एजेन्सी प्रमुखहरूले आ-आफ्ना तर्फबाट शिक्षा क्षेत्रमा रहेका कार्यक्रमबारे प्रकाश पारे। एसईएसपीमा लगानी साझेदारी गर्ने विकास साझेदार निकायका प्रमुखहरूले आजै मन्त्री सस्मित पोखरेलसँग भेटवार्ता गरी दुइपक्षीय हितका साथै विभिन्न निकायहरूले नेपालको शिक्षा क्षेत्रमा पुर्याउँदै आएको सहयोगको विषयमा छलफल भएको थियो। भेटमा विकास साझेदार निकायले नेपालको शिक्षा क्षेत्रमा गरिरहेको सहयोगलाई निरन्तरता दिने प्रतिबद्धता जनाएका थिए। बैठकको उद्घाटन सत्रमा सचिव पौडेलले शिक्षा क्षेत्रमा सरकार र विकास साझेदारको संयुक्त प्रयासबाट धेरै उपलब्धि हासिल गर्न सफल भएको बताए। तथापि विद्यालयमा आधारभूत तहमा विद्यार्थीको सिकाइ तथा शिक्षा क्षेत्रमा प्रविधिको प्रयोगलाई अझै प्राथमिकता दिनुपर्ने आवश्यक उनले औँल्याए। साथै उनले तीन तहको सरकारबीच प्रभावकारी समन्वय र सहकार्यका लागि स्रोत-साधन तथा जनशक्तिको व्यवस्थापन गरेर शिक्षालाई प्रभावकारी बनाइनुपर्नेमा जोड दिए। मन्त्रालयका सहसचिव शिवकुमार सापकोटाले शिक्षा क्षेत्रको सुधारका लागि मन्त्रालय र सम्बद्ध निकाय तथा विकास साझेदार निकायबाट भइरहेको समन्वय र साझेदारीबारे उल्लेख गरेका थिए। विकास सहायता समन्वय शाखाका प्रमुख रमेशप्रसाद घिमिरेले कार्यक्रमको उद्देश्य माथि प्रकाश पारे। बैठकको प्राविधिक सत्रमा शिक्षा मन्त्रालय र शिक्षा तथा मानव स्रोत विकास केन्द्रले आव ०८३/८४ का लागि अर्थ मन्त्रालयबाट प्राप्त भएको बजेट सिलिङका आधारमा शिक्षा मन्त्रालयबाट प्रस्ताव गरिएका विभिन्न कार्यक्रमको विषयमा समीक्षा भएको छ। बैठकले शिक्षा क्षेत्रसँग सम्बन्धित विभिन्न सूचकका विषयमा शिक्षा मन्त्रालय र सम्बद्ध निकायबाट भएको प्रगतिको पनि समीक्षा गरेको छ। विशेषगरी शिक्षा क्षेत्रमा आगामी आर्थिक वर्षमा तय गरिएका प्राथमिकताका क्षेत्रहरू, कस्ता-कस्ता कार्यक्रम राखिएका छन् के- कस्ता बजेट तर्जुमा भए तथा...

title: تساقط أمطار على هذه المناطق غدا الثلاثاء
content: كشفت مصالح الأرصاد الجوية، عن توقعات حالة الطقس، ليوم غد الثلاثاء، والذي سيعرف أجواءً مشمسة على أغلب ولايات الوطن. وحسب ذات المصالح، ستعرف المناطق الشمالية، غدا الثلاثاء، طقس مشمس. وستتراوح درجات الحرارة، بين 24 و31 درجة بالمناطق الساحلية، وبين 22 و30 درجة بالمناطق الداخلية. فيما ستصل سرعة الرياح إلى 30 كلم/سا. أما المناطق الجنوبية للوطن، فستعرف غدا الثلاثاء، طقس من مشمس إلى ممطر. وستتراوح درجات الحرارة بين 28 و45 درجة. فيما ستصل سرعة الرياح إلى 60 كلم/سا. إضغط على الصورة لتحميل تطبيق النهار للإطلاع على كل الآخبار على البلاي ستور The post تساقط أمطار على هذه المناطق غدا الثلاثاء appeared first on النهار أونلاين .

title: ಮ್ಯಾಜಿಕ್ ವ್ಯಾನ್-ಟ್ರಕ್ ಮುಖಾಮುಖಿ ಡಿಕ್ಕಿ: ಭೀಕರ ಅಪಘಾತದಲ್ಲಿ 10 ಮಂದಿ ಸಾವು; ಪರಿಹಾರ ಘೋಷಿಸಿದ ಪ್ರಧಾನಿ
प्रस्तावित प्रधानन्यायाधीश शर्माविरुद्धका १६ उजुरीमाथि भोलि संसदीय सुनुवाइ हुने
content: प्रस्तावित प्रधानन्यायाधीश डा. मनोज शर्माविरुद्ध परेको १६ वटा उजुरीमाथि छलफल गर्दै संसदीय सुनुवाइ प्रक्रिया भोलि नै अघि बढाइने भएको छ। प्रधानन्यायाधीशमा सिफारिस भएका शर्माविरुद्ध परेको उजुरी खोल्नका लागि संसदीय सुनुवाइ समितिको बैठक बिहान ८ बजे बोलाइएको छ। यसअघि गत वैशाख २६ गते बसेको समितिको बैठकले १० दिनको समयसीमा दिएर उजुरी आह्वान गर्ने निर्णय गरेको थियो। निर्धारित अवधिभित्र १६ वटा उजुरी दर्ता भएका हुन्। संसदीय सुनुवाइ समितिका सभापति बोधनारायण श्रेष्ठ का अनुसार, प्रारम्भमा उजुरी खोल्ने र त्यसलाई सांसदहरूबीच वितरण गर्ने कार्य हुनेछ। त्यसपछि बिहान १० बजेतिर उजुरीकर्तासँग छलफल गरिने तयारी छ। सभापति श्रेष्ठले त्यसपछिको बैठक निरन्तर चल्ने र सोही क्रममा प्रस्तावित प्रधानन्यायाधीश शर्माको संसदीय सुनुवाइ प्रक्रिया अगाडि बढाइने जानकारी दिएका छन्।

title: President meets senior officials of the Urban Development Authority
content: A discussion between President Anura Kumara Dissanayake and senior officials of the Urban Development Authority (UDA) was held this afternoon (18) at the Presidential Secretariat. The meeting focused extensively on new development projects planned by the Urban Development Authority. The President emphasised the need to ensure that the budgetary allocations made for these projects in the current year are utilised effectively within the same financial year. Detailed discussions were also held on projects planned to be implemented jointly by multiple institutions, including the importance of holding consultations with all relevant agencies to reach final decisions and the need to clearly define responsibilities for each institution in both implementation and maintenance phases of the projects. Attention was drawn to key initiatives such as the Kelani River flood control project, water management projects in Colombo city and the Beira Lake restoration project. The need for a dedicated programme for low-income housing in areas such as Ratmalana and Moratuwa was also highlighted. During the discussion, Minister of Transport, Highways and Urban Development Bimal Rathnayake underscored the importance of introducing a structured management framework for the effective coordination of certain projects. Deputy Minister of Urban Development, Eranga Gunasekara, Secretary to the Ministry of Transport, Highways and Urban Development, Senior Professor Kapila C.K. Perera, Chairman of the Urban Development Authority (UDA), M.G. Hemachandra and the Heads representing the Urban Settlement Development Authority (USDA), Sri Lanka Land Development Corporation (SLLDC), National Physical Planning Department (NPPD) and the Condominium Management Authority (CMA) were also present at the meeting. (PMD)

Courts decide on legal principles, not government: NPP responds to Bernard
content: Shillong: The National People’s Party has responded to recent statements made by Bernard Rimpu N. Marak regarding the granting of bail to certain individuals in an ongoing case, stressing that judicial decisions are made independently and should not be politicised. In a statement issued by Aldo A. Sangma, spokesperson of the NPP Garo Hills Region, the party said it was necessary to place certain facts in the proper perspective amid recent public comments on the matter. The party reiterated that in a democratic system governed by the rule of law, decisions related to bail and other judicial proceedings are taken independently by competent courts based on legal principles and available evidence, and that the executive has no role in determining such outcomes. It also clarified that the granting of bail is a legal provision and should not be interpreted as acquittal or exoneration, noting that investigations in the case are still ongoing and due legal process will continue. The NPP urged political leaders and public representatives to exercise restraint and responsibility while commenting on sensitive legal matters in order to preserve public trust in democratic institutions and avoid unnecessary confusion among citizens. The party further highlighted Meghalaya’s progress in recent years, attributing it to peace, stability and collective efforts by citizens and governments. ALSO READ: Former MLA Esmatur Mominin surrenders in Nongpoh over Garo Hills unrest It said both the state and central governments have continued to work together on development, infrastructure, welfare and economic growth for all sections of society. “At a time when Meghalaya is moving forward on multiple fronts, all political stakeholders must maintain healthy democratic discourse and work constructively in the larger interest of the state and its people,” the statement said. Reaffirming its commitment, the NPP said it remains dedicated to peace, communal harmony, constitutional values and inclusive development for every citizen of Meghalaya. Earlier, Tura MDC Bernard N. Marak has raised concerns over what he described as “differential treatment” by the Meghalaya government in cases related to the recent Garo Hills unrest, questioning whether there is a “nexus” between the chief minister and former Phulbari MLA Esmatur Mominin. تحديث جديد لـ PS5 يضم قائمة الألعاب الأكثر شعبية وعدد اللاعبين الحاليين
content: بعد سنوات طويلة من الغموض حول أعداد اللاعبين على أجهزة الكونسول، بدأت شركة Sony تحرك المياه الراكدة نحو الشفافية، بأسلوب يشبه ما يقدمه متجر Steam للاعبين منذ سنوات، حيث بدأت باختبار ميزة جديدة على جهاز PS5 تسمح بعرض عدد اللاعبين وأكثر الألعاب شعبية بشكل مباشر داخل واجهة النظام. PS5 يطلق ميزة عرض أعداد اللاعبين والألعاب الأكثر شعبية أطلقت Sony لأول مرة داخل نسخ البيتا من نظام PS5 ويدجت جديدًا ضمن Welcome Hub يعرض قائمة بأكثر 10 ألعاب شعبية خلال الأسبوع، بالإضافة إلى قسم “Trending” الذي يكشف عن الألعاب التي شهدت قفزات كبيرة مؤخراً في ساعات اللعب، معززة بذلك شفافية المنصة وتجربة المستخدم في اكتشاف العناوين الصاعدة. مقارنة بالأساليب التقليدية وأدوات Steam كانت منصات الكونسول تاريخياً تفتقر إلى هذه الشفافية، مما جعل اللاعبين يعتمدون على معلومات غير رسمية أو تصريحات المطورين لتقدير حجم المجتمع حول لعبة ما، في حين توفر Steam أدوات مثل Steam Charts وSteamDB التي تعرض عدد اللاعبين في الوقت الحقيقي، مما يمنح اللاعبين رؤية واضحة وموثوقة. فوائد قسم “Trending” لاكتشاف الألعاب الجديدة يشكل قسم “Trending” إضافة مميزة، حيث يسلط الضوء على الألعاب التي تشهد عودة نشاط قوية بسبب تحديثات أو اهتمام متزايد من اللاعبين، ما يتيح فرصة لاستكشاف عناوين ربما لم تكن معروفة أو متداولة بشكل واسع من قبل، وينشط حيوية مجتمع اللاعبين على منصة PS5. الآراء المختلطة حول إظهار أعداد اللاعبين رغم الحماس، أعرب بعض لاعبي PS5 عن مخاوفهم من أن تحول أعداد اللاعبين إلى مقياس رئيسي لتقييم نجاح الألعاب، مما قد يقلل من التركيز على جودة المحتوى وتجربة اللعب، خاصة وأن هذا المشهد كان شائعًا في مجتمع Steam الذي شهد أحيانًا تأثيرًا سلبيًا لهذا الأمر. إعادة بناء الجوانب الاجتماعية على PS5 يُذكر أن PS5 لا يزال يفتقد بعض الخصائص الاجتماعية التي كانت موجودة في PS4، مثل مجتمعات اللاعبين وواجهة “What’s New”، ما يجعل هذه الخطوة ضمن الميزة الجديدة بداية لإعادة تنشيط الجانب الاجتماعي على المنصة، مع استعداد Sony للإعلان عن مزايا أوسع في المستقبل مع وصول الجيل القادم. أخيرًا، لم تُعلن Sony عن موعد رسمي لوصول هذه الميزة لجميع المستخدمين، لكنها بالفعل بدأت بانتشارها تدريجيًا ضمن النسخ التجريبية، مما يفتح آفاقًا جديدة أمام لاعبي PS5 للاستمتاع بتجربة أكثر شفافية وتفاعلية. وضحنا لكم عبر محتوى بلس كيف بدأت Sony في تحديث تجربة مستخدمي PS5، حيث توفر ميزة عرض أعداد اللاعبين والألعاب الرائجة، مما يعزز اكتشاف الألعاب ويدعم جانب التواصل الاجتماعي، ويُعد هذا التوجه هاما لمواكبة التطورات العالمية في مجال الألعاب الإلكترونية، فتابعوا آخر التحديثات ولا تفوتوا هذه المزايا الجديدة التي تضيف قيمة كبيرة لعشاق عالم الألعاب الرقمية.

WKO ebenfalls dagegen - Front gegen Paketsteuer wird immer breiter
content: Der Aufschrei gegen die ab Herbst geplante Paketsteuer wird immer lauter. Die Abgabe verfehle ihren Zweck vollkommen, lautet die Kritik der Wirtschaftskammer. Der Widerstand aus der Wirtschaft und seitens Privatpersonen sei massiv, konstatierte die Wirtschaftskammer Österreich (WKÖ) am Montag unter Verweis auf ablehnende Stellungnahmen auf der Homepage des Parlaments. Davor hatten auch der Handelsverband und die FPÖ dagegen gewettert. Sie sehen darin einen Inflationstreiber.Bei den Entscheidungsträgern müsse „endlich klar ankommen, dass die Paketsteuer in der jetzigen Form die absolut Falschen trifft, nämlich steuerzahlende, österreichische Handelsunternehmen und Konsumentinnen und Konsumenten“, so der Berufsgruppensprecher des Bundesgremiums des Versand- und Internethandels in der Wirtschaftskammer Österreich (WKÖ), Alexander Smuk, am Montag in einer Aussendung.4139976 4121497 „Asiatische Plattformen werden Wege finden“„Asiatische Plattformen, die eigentlich der Adressat für die Regelung waren, werden hier Wege finden, um die Steuerlast so gering wie möglich zu halten“, befürchtet der Branchenvertreter. Übrig blieben am Ende die heimischen Händler und Konsumenten.Die geplante Paketsteuer in Höhe von zwei Euro pro Sendung soll nach dem 30. September in Kraft treten und für große Onlinehändler mit einem Jahresumsatz von mehr als 100 Millionen Euro gelten. Laut Finanzministerium soll die Abgabe jährlich Zusatzeinnahmen in Höhe von rund 280 Millionen Euro einspielen.Welche Händler betroffen sindSie entfällt nur auf Geschäfte mit Endkunden, B2B-Onlineshops sind davon nicht betroffen. Paketsteuer müssen in Österreich ab Herbst unter anderem Amazon, MediaMarkt, Niceshops, Otto, Shein, Temu und Zalando abführen. Kleine Händler, die über größere Online-Marktplätze (u.a. Amazon) ihre Waren verkaufen, sind auch von der Abgabe betroffen.

title: Si në filma aksion! Del videoja kur autorët futen brenda argjendarisë në Kamëz, thyejnë xhamat dhe marrin bizhuteritë
content: Publikohen pamjet e grabitjes së argjendarisë në Kamëz, ku dy persona të maskuar shfaqen duke hyrë me shpejtësi në biznes dhe duke marrë bizhuteri nën kërcënimin e armës. Në videon e publikuar, njëri prej autorëve shihet me një armë. të ngjashme me kallashnikovin, ndërsa tjetri përdor një çekan për të thyer xhamat e banakut të argjendarisë. E gjithë ngjarja ka zgjatur vetëm pak sekonda. Në momentin që autorët futen në dyqan, shitësja që ndodhej në pjesën e pasme mbyll derën për të shmangur përballjen me grabitësit.

The Smashing Pumpkins Announce ‘Mellon Collie’ 30th Anniversary Tour
content: The Smashing Pumpkins have announced the details of ‘The Rats In A Cage Tour’, celebrating 30 years of their seminal album ‘Mellon Collie And The Infinite Sadness’. Set to make its way across North America from September to November, the band will be playing two unique and ambitious sets that not only give the album its moment in the sun but also so many other moments in their 40 years of music-making, with fan favourites, deep cuts and hits aplenty. So expected the unexpected. Vocalist/guitarist Billy Corgan had this to say about the tour, stating, “ Staging a Mellon Collie-themed show is something we’ve discussed for over a decade, and finally the stars have aligned and exactly on the terms I’d set: which was to build a special night around its most enduring aspirations and ideas. With set 1 of the Rats In A Cage tour exclusively featuring Mellon Collie songs in a highly theatrical setting, and set 2 drawing from the rest of our canon so that there’s a decent amount of variance as to what songs we’ll play from night to night: from our first in ‘Gish’ to our last in ‘Aghori Mhori Mei’.” And here are all of the dates: SEPTEMBER 30 – COLUMBUS Schottenstein Center OCTOBER 02 – BOSTON TD Garden 03 – BALTIMORE CFG Bank Arena 04 – BROOKLYN Barclays Center 06 – PITTSBURGH PPG Paints Arena 07 – HAMILTON TD Coliseum 09 – MONTREAL Bell Centre 11 – MADISON Kohl Center 13 – ST PAUL Grand Casino Arena 14 – CHICAGO United Center 16 – CHARLOTTE Spectrum Center 17 – JACKSONVILLE VyStar Veterans Memorial Arena 18 – TAMPA Benchmark International Arena 20 – INDIANAPOLIS Gainbridge Fieldhouse 22 – NASHVILLE The Truth 24 – OKLAHOMA CITY Paycom Center 25 – AUSTIN Moody Center 27 – DENVER Ball Arena 29 – SALT LAKE CITY Delta Center 30 – LAS VEGAS MGM Grand Garden Arena NOVEMBER 01 – PORTLAND Moda Center 03 – CALGARY Scotiabank Saddledome 05 – VANCOUVER Rogers Arena 06 – SEATTLE Climate Pledge Arena 08 – SAN JOSE SAP Center 11 – PHOENIX Mortgage Matchup Center 12 – LOS ANGELES Kia Forum Tickets will go on sale from May 21 at 10 am local on smashingpumpkins.com The post The Smashing Pumpkins Announce ‘Mellon Collie’ 30th Anniversary Tour appeared first on Rock Sound .

CEV, Femeval y AVIA celebran la llegada del Bronco a Ford Almussafes: «Pone fin a la incertidumbre»
content: La CEV, Femeval y AVIA han celebrado la adjudicación del nuevo Ford Bronco a la planta de Almussafes , una decisión que, según la patronal del metal, “pone fin a la incertidumbre” sobre el futuro de la factoría valenciana. Las tres organizaciones coinciden en que el anuncio refuerza el papel industrial de la Comunitat Valenciana y aporta visibilidad a la red de proveedores, empresas industriales y compañías tecnológicas vinculadas a la planta. La Confederación Empresarial de la Comunitat Valenciana (CEV) ha considerado una “excelente noticia” el anuncio de Ford sobre la adjudicación de la fabricación del modelo Bronco a la planta de Almussafes. La patronal ha defendido que la decisión “refuerza la confianza en la capacidad industrial de la Comunitat Valenciana” y debe interpretarse como una oportunidad para consolidar el peso de la industria valenciana en el sector de la automoción. El presidente de la CEV, Vicente Lafuente , ha señalado que la adjudicación del nuevo modelo es “una decisión que refuerza el papel estratégico de la factoría valenciana dentro de la industria europea de automoción” y “una señal relevante de confianza en las capacidades productivas, logísticas y tecnológicas” del territorio. Lafuente ha añadido que la decisión supone también “un elemento de tranquilidad y confianza” para las empresas proveedoras vinculadas a la factoría y para los miles de trabajadores cuya actividad depende, directa o indirectamente, de la evolución de Ford Almussafes . Leer más: Ford confirma el Bronco para Almussafes dentro de su plan de expansión en Europa La CEV ha situado el anuncio en un contexto de transformación para el sector, marcado por “la transición hacia nuevos modelos de movilidad, la irrupción de nuevos competidores globales y la necesidad de acompasar sostenibilidad, competitividad y demanda”. En este escenario, la patronal ha subrayado que la apuesta de Ford por Almussafes representa una oportunidad para “reforzar el posicionamiento industrial de la Comunitat Valenciana” y consolidar un ecosistema empresarial “altamente especializado, innovador y con capacidad de adaptación”. La capacidad ociosa en la planta de Ford, cercana al 75% Por su parte, la Federación Empresarial Metalúrgica Valenciana (Femeval) ha valorado “de forma muy positiva” el anuncio de Ford de fabricar el Bronco en Almussafes a partir de 2028. JDT II Muncul Juara Liga A1 Kali Pertama
content: Johor Darul Ta’zim (JDT) II dinobatkan sebagai juara Liga A1 Semi-Pro 2025-2026 selepas mengikat Kelantan WTS pada Isnin. Kejayaan ini disahkan selepas JDT II berjaya mengutip satu mata yang penting ketika terikat seri 2-2 bertemu Kelantan WTS dalam perlawanan minggu ke-29 Liga A1 Semi-Pro di Kota Bharu. Satu mata tersebut sudah cukup buat JDT II mengesahkan status sebagai juara Liga A1 Semi-Pro musim 2025-2026 walaupun masih berbaki satu lagi perlawanan sebelum tirai ditutup. Pada aksi tersebut, JDT II ketinggalan dua jaringan apabila gol Nazrin Nawi dan Dandy Arbdallah berhasil meletakkan Kelantan WTS di hadapan sebelum wisel penamat separuh masa pertama dibunyikan. Kebangkitan mula menjelma di babak kedua apabila Danish Hakimi dan Danish Zahir masing-masing menjaringkan gol pada minit ke-51 dan 76 buat JDT II meraih satu mata cukup bermakna. Kedudukan semasa menyaksikan JDT II bergelar juara Liga A1 Semi-Pro dengan mengutip 62 mata, 4 mata di hadapan Selangor II yang terpaksa berpuas hati di tangga yang kedua.

Sullivan signs to cheer at Huntington College
content: As a well-sized crowd packed into the Jemison High School auditorium, cheerleader Kristen Sullivan took the stage, accompanied by her parents. Though she has been in many Jemison crowds cheering, on this day, they were cheering her on instead. On May 8, Sullivan signed with Huntington College to continue her cheerleading career as many friends, teachers and athletes filed in to support her. “I’m excited, and I’m nervous,” said Sullivan. “I got an offer there, and they just seem like a great school.” Sullivan has been cheering since she was six years old. The whole time she has been cheering, she has been in a Jemison or Jemison-adjacent program. “(Jemison) has been really good at helping me cheer, and they are just a good school,” said Sullivan. Sullivan wants to study elementary education at Huntington, and when she graduates, she hopes to help coach a competitive cheerleading team.

Abaregwa kudasobanura inkomoko y’imitungo bafite basabiwe ibihano bikomeye
content: Muhanga: Ubushinjacyaha bwasabiye abagabo 4 igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka icumi kuri buri wese, baregwa kudasobanura inkomoka y’imitungo bafite. Mu iburanisha ryabereye mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Muhanga, Ubushinjacyaha bwasabiye Ngendahimana Patrick, Nshimiyimana Joseph, Kayitare Joseph na Dushimimana Christophe igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 10 kuri buri wese no gutanga ihazabu ikabakaba miliyari 2.3Frw ihazabu yabo yose iteranyirijwe hamwe. Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko icyaha aba bose bakurikiranyweho ari ukudasobanura inkomoko y’umutungo bafite nk’uko bivugwa mu itegeko. Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko uwitwa Kayitare Joseph atabashije gusobanura aho inkomoko y’umutungo ungana na miliyoni 500Frw yawukuye. Ubushinjacyaha bwongeyeho ko imitungo ya Ngendahimana Patrick igizwe n’inzu, imodoka n’ibibanza yigwijeho akaba atabasha gusobanura aho ibi byose abikomora, bumusabira igifungo cy’imyaka 10 n’ihazabu ya miliyari imwe n’igice y’u Rwanda. Ubushinjacyaha bushinja kandi uwitwa Nshimiyimana Joseph kugira umutungo wa miliyoni 100 y’u Rwanda ugizwe n’inzu ifite agaciro ka miliyoni 85Frw ndetse n’imodoka atabasha kugaragariza Urwego rw’Umuvunyi n’Ubushinjacyaha aho awukomora. Ubushinjacyaha bumusabira igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 10 n’ihazabu ya miliyoni 300Frw. Ubushinjacyaha kandi bukurikiranye Dushimimana Christophe icyaha cyo kudasobanura aho akomora umutungo ufite agaciro ka miliyoni 144 y’u Rwanda, ugizwe n’inzu esheshatu, imodoka, ndetse n’imirima. Yasabiwe igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 10 n’ihazabu ingana na miliyoni 510Frw. Buvuga ko uwitwa Kayitare Joseph bumushinja imitungo igizwe n’inzu 2 imwe ikaba iherereye mu Karere ka Muhanga, n’aka Kamonyi zifite agaciro kangana na miliyoni makumyabiri n’ebyeri n’ibihumbi magana inani y’u Rwanda, uyu akaba asabirwa guhanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka 10 n’ihazabu ya miliyoni 53Frw. Aba bose bahakana ibyaha baregwa kuko bigeze kubyisobanuraho mu bugenzacyaha no Bushinjacyaha mu myaka yashize, ababazaga banyurwa n’ibisobanuro batanze, dosiye zabo zirashyingurwa. Ngendahimana ati: ”Icyaha banshinja ndagihakana kuko natangiye umurimo w’ubucukuzi bw’amabuye y’agaciro kuva mu mwaka wa 1999, kandi ibisobanuro natanze babishingiyeho basanga umutungo banshinja ufite inkomoko.” Bagenzi be bavuga ko imitungo baregwa kudatangira ibisobanuro by’aho bayikuye bayifitiye ibimenyetso bifatika, kuko usibye kuba barayikuye mu bucukuzi bw’amabuye y’agaciro bamaze imyaka bakora, hari n’iyo bashinjwa kandi bafite abagore bayihahanye kuko harimo...

content: Suvendu Adhikari PA Murder Case: CBI ने मुजफ्फरनगर पुलिस के साथ मिलकर, पश्चिम बंगाल के CM शुभेंदु अधिकारी के PA की हत्या के मामले में राजकुमार नाम के एक आरोपी को गिरफ्तार किया है. आरोपी को मुजफ्फरनगर से गिरफ्तार किया गया. वह मुख्य शूटर है. The CBI, in collaboration with the Muzaffarnagar Police, has arrested an accused named Rajkumar in connection with the murder case of West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari's PA. The accused was arrested in Muzaffarnagar; he is the main shooter. The CBI has obtained a transit remand for... pic.twitter.com/3e126asBPf — ANI (@ANI) May 18, 2026 बलिया का रहने वाला मुख्य आरोपी चंद्रनाथ रथ (पश्चिम बंगाल के मुख्यमंत्री सुवेंदु अधिकारी के PA) हत्याकांड का मुख्य आरोपी राजकुमार बलिया का रहने वाला है. उसे CBI ने दिल्ली-देहरादून हाईवे पर स्थित छपार टोल प्लाजा से गिरफ्तार किया. title: Confusion trails APC House of Representatives primaries in Lagos
content: By Lukman Olabiyi Allegations of irregularities, confusion, and simultaneous claims of victory that followed the party’s House of Representatives primary elections on Saturday have caused a crisis within the All Progressives Congress (APC) chapter in Lagos. In Lagos Mainland Federal Constituency, some aspirants rejected the outcome of the exercise, insisting that no valid election took place in several wards across the constituency. The aggrieved aspirants, who include Prince Abdulhakeem Animashahun, Lanre Oshun and Dr Tokunbo Oluwole, described the primary as chaotic, alleging widespread irregularities, disruption and intimidation by political actors and their supporters. The aspirants, who have reportedly submitted a formal petition to the APC Lagos State Secretariat in ACME, Ogba, called on the party leadership to nullify the exercise and investigate the conduct of electoral officials involved in the process. According to them, elections did not hold in at least eight wards within the constituency due to confusion and a breakdown of order during the exercise. They questioned how results could have been declared and submitted by the returning officer despite the alleged failure of voting in many polling areas. “One wonders how results could emerge from wards where voting never took place. There was confusion and chaos across the constituency, yet figures were allegedly compiled and submitted as authentic results,” one of the aspirants said. The petitioners maintained that the exercise fell short of the democratic standards expected of a ruling party, alleging that genuine party members were denied the opportunity to freely choose their preferred candidate. They urged the Lagos APC leadership to immediately cancel the submitted results and constitute an independent panel to investigate complaints arising from the primary election. Similarly, confusion also trailed the APC primary election in Kosofe Federal Constituency, where two aspirants laid claim to victory. The incumbent lawmaker representing the constituency in the House of Representatives, Hon. Kafilat Ogbara, claimed she emerged as the winner of the poll, while former Chairman of Agboyi-Ketu Local Council Development Area (LCDA), Dele Oshinowo, also declared himself the winner. The controversies surrounding the primaries have heightened tension within the Lagos APC, amid growing allegations of voter suppression, manipulation and irregularities in some federal constituencies across the state. Stellantis, Accenture e NVIDIA insieme per lo sviluppo industriale dell'AI
content: Stellantis ha annunciato l’intenzione di avviare una partnership strategica con Accenture, per accelerare l’utilizzo di funzionalità di digital twin abilitate dall’intelligenza artificiale, sfruttando le tecnologie NVIDIA, all’interno della propria rete produttiva globale. L’obiettivo è esplorare lo sviluppo di ambienti manifatturieri virtuali di nuova generazione, alimentati da dati in tempo reale e intelligenza artificiale.

A Cannes una spiaggia pubblica intitolata a Brigitte Bardot
content: La spiaggia di Macé, situata vicino al Palais des Festivals, porterà ora il nome di Brigitte Bardot. Alla cerimonia inaugurale hanno partecipato il sindaco David Lisnard e la presidente del Festival Iris Knobloch. Il Comune ha inoltre annunciato che l’accesso ai cani sarà consentito in alcune fasce orarie, una scelta pensata anche come richiamo all’impegno dell’attrice per i diritti degli animali, causa sostenuta con forza fino agli ultimi anni della sua vita.

Eddie Huang Knows Menswear. So Does His New Novel.
content: Everyone knows that Eddie Huang dresses cool. He has an unparalleled jersey collection. He can really, truly pull off a bucket hat. And shearling. And he was on the Ugg train at least two years before everyone else got on board. So it’s no surprise that fashion permeates his debut novel, Come Undone . The book, out June 16 from One World, is about a guy named Hubie who travels the world taping episodes for his food show. His career has taken off, all the world’s bigwigs love him, he works with his best friend and has what’s ostensibly a glamorous life in LA. Except he’s still morbidly depressed, desperate to love and be loved. We go with him through the performance of dating in Los Angeles, and then — in the least likely place — he meets The Girl. The girl who flips his shit upside down and forces him to reexamine and rework his entire life. Chaos, obviously, ensues. And so do outfits. The clothes show up chapter after chapter as mile markers to describe who the characters are and how they feel at any given moment. Their close emotional and psychological ties to fashion stem from Huang’s own experience. “My mom was very into fashion because consumerism, looking fly, being pretty covered up that my dad was beating the shit out of her,” he tells me one afternoon at his downtown restaurant, Baohaus . When he discovered his own style, the associations were just as charged. As a kid, “I wanted to be a basketball player so I dressed like a basketball player,” he says. “But I could also fit into the clothes. On the most visceral level, I was into hip-hop and basketball and Black culture because you had Fat Albert, Fat Boys, Heavy D, Biggie. Street culture allowed for a fat kid to feel fly.” His mom shamed him for his size, but there was still self-expression, novelty, and joy in making his own stylistic choices. In reading Come Undone, I started to dog-ear every page that name dropped a designer or a specific look. And when I spoke to Huang, I asked him to take me through each instance. The clothes speak to the characters, sure, but they speak just as much to Huang’s own integration in the world of style. (He wouldn’t tell you outright, but he was the inspiration for Justin Bieber’s giant Coachella shorts .) “I do think people who gravitate toward fashion as a form of self-expression will find another layer in this book that’s just for them,” he says. Early-on in the book, Hubie gets roped into a group dinner with the friends of a girl he’s casually dating. As...

Polymarket, Kalshi... : les États-Unis parient sur l’IA pour détecter les délits d’initiés
content: L'IA is the new 42 Alors que les plateformes de paris en ligne sont de plus en plus pointées du doigt pour encourager les délits d’initiés, l’agence de régulation CFTC explique s’appuyer sur l’IA pour les détecter. L’administration Trump commence à voir s’amonceler les critiques sur la non-régulation des plateformes de paris en ligne comme Polymarket et Kalshi. Elle y répond en mettant en avant son utilisation de l’IA pour la détection de potentiels délits d’initiés. Début avril, sept membres démocrates du Congrès américain ont écrit à Michael Selig [ PDF ], le responsable de l’agence de régulation des bourses de commerce (Commodity Futures Trading Commission, CFTC). Ils s’inquiétaient « que les marchés prédictifs en soient venus à ressembler à un « Far West » sans aucune réglementation ». « De récentes affaires très médiatisées d’allégations de délit d’initié sur des plateformes de marchés prédictifs concernant des actions du gouvernement américain — notamment l’intervention militaire au Venezuela et notre récente attaque contre l’Iran — ont alimenté les inquiétudes quant à l’insuffisance des contrôles exercés par la CFTC sur ces marchés en pleine expansion », ajoutaient-ils. Deux semaines après, on apprenait l’arrestation d’un soldat états-unien dans le cadre du pari sur la chute de Maduro, qui lui avait permis d’empocher 430 000 dollars sur Polymarket. Mais ce pari est loin d’être le seul qui soulève des questions sur de possibles délits d’initiés. Ainsi, le New York Times racontait la semaine dernière qu’un petit groupe de 13 personnes a parié un total de 140 000 dollars le 12 juin 2025 sur le fait qu’Israël allait bombarder l’Iran avant la fin de la semaine. Dans la nuit du 12 au 13 juin, Israël lançait une offensive qui déclenchera une guerre de douze jours. Le groupe de parieurs a empoché plus de 600 000 dollars de profit. 11 000 comptes suspicieux détectés par le New York Times Le journal américain explique avoir repéré plus de 11 000 comptes suspicieux. Ceux-ci correspondent aux comptes qui, soit ont fait des paris risqués gagnants, des mises effectuées au bon moment par des comptes récemment ouverts, ainsi que des paris placés par des utilisateurs qui ne misent que sur quelques thèmes géopolitiques comme ceux-là sans jamais perdre, expliquent-ils, tout en ajoutant qu’en se basant seulement sur les données publiques trouvées sur Polymarket, « il est impossible de déterminer si...

title: Judge Grants Luigi Mangione’s Bid to Suppress Evidence Due to Unlawful Search
content: A state court judge on Monday partially granted Luigi Mangione’s bid to prevent evidence found in his backpack during his arrest from being admitted at his murder trial for allegedly assassinating a health insurance executive in Manhattan. Mangione, 28, is accused of gunning down UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson on a Midtown sidewalk in December 2024. Public officials condemned the brazen killing, but it became emblematic of some Americans’ antipathy for health insurance industry practices and rising costs. Mangione has pleaded not guilty in state court to all charges. His trial is set to begin on September 8 and is expected to last six weeks. The ruling is a legal boost for Mangione, although prosecutors say they have ample evidence of his guilt. Justice Gregory Carro granted Mangione’s request to suppress some of the evidence found in his backpack during his arrest in Pennsylvania, ruling police unlawfully searched the bag without a warrant. That evidence included a loaded handgun magazine, cell phone and computer chip. However, Carro ruled that a second search of the backpack at a police station was lawful and that items recovered then — including a gun, silencer, USB drive and red notebook — would be admissible. Carro denied Mangione’s bid to suppress his initial statements to law enforcement, rejecting his argument that he was illegally interrogated. The judge announced his decision during a brief hearing at a New York state court in Manhattan, with Mangione in attendance. Additional Evidence Mangione’s lawyers argued that the contents of his backpack and statements to law enforcement during his arrest in Pennsylvania should be inadmissible because he was illegally searched and not given notice of his legal rights. Prosecutors with the office of Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg deny claims that Mangione was illegally searched and questioned. In court filings, prosecutors have detailed a broad range of evidence linking Mangione to the killing, including DNA, fingerprints, hundreds of hours of video footage, a cell phone and another backpack that he allegedly dropped during his flight from New York. Thompson, who led UnitedHealth Group’s health insurance business, was shot and killed on December 4, 2024 outside the Hilton hotel where the company was holding an investors’ meeting. Mangione was arrested in Pennsylvania after a five-day manhunt and has been jailed ever since. State prosecutors initially charged Mangione with terrorism, but Carro...

title: Modi Govt Kneeling Before Trump, Surrenders India’s National Interests to America: Kuldeep Dhaliwal
content: Chandigarh/Amritsar, May 18, 2026 (Yes Punjab News) Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) Punjab Chief Spokesperson and MLA Kuldeep Dhaliwal launched a sharp attack on the Modi-led Central Government, saying that Prime Minister Narendra Modi has surrendered India’s interests into the hands of America. He said that under the recent trade deal between India and the United States, the Modi Government has stabbed the country in the back. According to him, the most dangerous and significant condition of this deal was that India would stop purchasing cheap oil from Russia and instead buy expensive oil from America and its allied nations. He said that the United States first gave India a 30-day window to continue purchasing oil from Russia, then reduced it to 10 days and later to 8 days, and now, from May 16 onwards, has completely tightened the noose around India by forcing it to reduce oil purchases from Russia to the minimum possible level. MLA Dhaliwal said that India, which earlier used to purchase nearly 60 percent of its total oil requirement from Russia at highly affordable prices, has now, due to the Modi Government’s flawed policies, been reduced to importing only 10 percent from Russia. The remaining oil is now being purchased compulsorily from America and countries dictated by America. He said that oil from American-linked countries is now costing more than 110 dollars per barrel. The Modi Government has accepted Donald Trump as the ‘Sarpanch’ of India, and that same Sarpanch is now sitting in America and framing oppressive policies for India. Dhaliwal cautioned the people of the country, the people of Punjab, and farmers that with the stoppage of cheap Russian oil, petrol and diesel prices are set to rise sharply in the coming days. He said the intention of the Modi Government can be clearly understood from the fact that just four to five days ago, CNG prices were increased by Rs 2, and yesterday another Re 1 was quietly increased again. Through this backdoor route, the entire script to make petrol and diesel more expensive has already been prepared. Dhaliwal further said that the restrictions imposed by America on purchasing oil from Russia will directly burden the common people and farmers of India. Dhaliwal said that the BJP-led Central Government is completely anti-farmer, anti-Punjab, and anti-India. CENTCOM says 84 vessels diverted during Iran maritime blockade
content: The US Central Command (CENTCOM) announced Monday that 84 commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz had been redirected since the start of the US blockade on Iranian ports. CENTCOM said in a statement on X that “as part of the naval blockade imposed on Iranian ports, 84 commercial vessels were directed to return either to their berths or to port.” The statement added that US forces intercepted four vessels to ensure compliance with the American blockade. Washington continues to bolster its military deployment in the Middle East, including air defense systems, naval forces and aircraft carriers, amid repeated US warnings to Iran over the possibility of renewed military confrontation. Following the US military operation dubbed “Epic Rage,” during which American strikes on Iran lasted around six weeks, Washington launched what it describes as “economic rage” against Tehran, combining intensified sanctions with a naval blockade now entering its fourth consecutive week. The post CENTCOM says 84 vessels diverted during Iran maritime blockade appeared first on Times Kuwait .

title: Sheinbaum confirma que UIF congeló cuentas de Rocha Moya y funcionarios señalados por EU
content: Ciudad de México .- La presidenta Claudia Sheinbaum Pardo confirmó este lunes 18 de mayo, que la Unidad de Inteligencia Financiera (UIF) congeló cuentas de los 10 funcionarios señalados por Estados Unidos. Durante la Mañanera del Pueblo, detalló que dicha instancia dará a conocer mediante un comunicado las razones por las que se congelaron las cuentas. “Van a sacar un comunicado en un rato, les pedí que lo sacarán, plantea que es de manera preventiva, ahí se va a explicar en el documento, dado que hay una orden de aprehensión en Estados Unidos contra 10 personas, los bancos de aquí, como tienen relación con los bancos de allá, toman una serie de medidas y de manera automática preventivamente lo hace la UIF”, dijo. La titular del Ejecutivo agregó que son mecanismos automáticos que se realizan en cualquiera de los casos. Información por El Heraldo de México

Eldred WWII Museum hosts son of Holocaust survivors
content: ELDRED, Pa. — Author and son of Michael and Eva Mozes Kor, Holocaust survivors, will speak at 6:30 p.m. Thursday, June 4, in the Museum’s Mitchell Paige Hall. The event is free and open to the public. Kor will speak about his parent’s experience as Holocaust survivors. His father, who survived Buchenwald concentration camp; and his mother Eva and her twin sister, who were subjected to the inhumane experiments of Dr. Josef Mengele at Auschwitz concentration camp, as portrayed in his book “A Blessing Not A Burden.” Join Dr. Kor as he brings history to life and shares life lessons that have helped him overcome his own hardships. Originally from Terre Haute, Ind. and a resident of Carmel, Ind. for seven years, Dr. Alex Kor has a B.S. in chemistry from Butler University and a M.S. in exercise physiology from Purdue University. He received his D.P.M. (Doctor of Podiatric Medicine) from the Scholl College of Podiatric Medicine in Chicago. Dr. Kor is a full-time podiatrist for Hendricks Regional Health in Danville, Ind., and is a clinical assistant professor for Marian University College of Osteopathic Medicine. Knowing the importance of being the son of two Holocaust survivors who have both passed away in the last six-plus years, Alex feels an obligation to tell their stories. Since 1985, he has traveled to Auschwitz more than 20 times with his late mother. Since her passing in 2019, he has continued to lead these tours. He is a member of the CANDLES Holocaust Museum and Education Center Board of Directors and assisted in establishing an exhibit (Eva Kor from Auschwitz to Indiana) to honor his mother in downtown Indianapolis at the Indiana Historical Society. His 2024 book, co-authored with Graham Honaker, “A Blessing, Not a Burden” which chronicles his parents’ lives as well as how they positively impacted Dr. Kor, is now available.

title: Moskau klagt über Angriffe Kiews auf AKW Saporischschja
content: Die Lage rund um das von Moskau besetzte und kontrollierte ukrainische Atomkraftwerk Saporischschja spitzt sich aus russischer Sicht bedrohlich zu. "Wir nähern uns immer mehr einem Punkt, ab dem es kein Zurück mehr gibt", sagte Alexej Lichatschow, Leiter des Moskauer Atomkonzerns Rosatom. Der Konzern hatte das von russischen Truppen besetzte AKW unmittelbar nach Beginn der Invasion vor über vier Jahren unter seine Kontrolle gebracht. In der vergangenen Zeit häuften sich mutmasslich ukrainische Artillerie- und Drohnenangriffe auf das Kraftwerksgelände. Lichatschow betonte, dass "dieses Spiel mit dem Feuer" vor allem für Osteuropa gefährlich werden könne. Daher sollte sich Europa bemühen und seine Kräfte bündeln, um die Lage rund um das AKW zu deeskalieren. Lichatschow wies darauf hin, dass sich auf dem Gelände des Kraftwerks rund 2.600 Tonnen nukleares Brennmaterial befinde. "Und natürlich entstehen im Falle eines gezielten Treffers, insbesondere in Lagern für Kernbrennstoff, Risiken von regionaler Tragweite", sagte er. Grösstes Atomkraftwerk Europas Angesichts wiederholter ukrainischer Angriffe auf das Umfeld des Kernkraftwerks erklärte Lichatschow, dass auch die soziale Infrastruktur Bestandteil des Sicherheitssystems des AKW sei. Daher wären Angriffe etwa auf Bushaltestellen, Transportmittel oder Kindergärten "eine Eskalation der Lage bis hin zur Katastrophe". Erst am Vortag waren nach russischer Darstellung bei einem ukrainischen Artillerieangriff auf das AKW mehrere Busse in einer Fahrzeughalle zerstört oder beschädigt worden. Das mit sechs Reaktoren und einer Nennleistung von 6.000 Megawatt grösste Atomkraftwerk Europas steht seit März 2022 unter russischer Kontrolle. Es produziert derzeit keinen Strom. Mehrere ukrainische Rückeroberungsversuche scheiterten. Ein Team der internationalen Atombehörde IAEA ist ständig vor Ort, um die Lage zu beobachten und durch seine Präsenz einen Atomunfall zu verhindern.

لقاء طاولة الحوار بكلية الاقتصاد والإدارة بجامعة الملك عبدالعزيز يستضيف رئيس هيئة السوق المالية
content: البلاد (جدة) استضافت جامعة الملك عبدالعزيز ممثلة في كلية الاقتصاد والإدارة رئيس مجلس هيئة السوق المالية محمد القويز، ضمن فعالية لقاءات على طاولة الحوار التي تعقدها الكلية وتستضيف خلالها عدد من القيادات والخبراء السعوديين، يوم الخميس 27-11-1447هـ الموافق 14مايو 2026. وشاهد الحضور من طلاب وطالبات كلية الاقتصاد والإدارة عرضا عن أبرز مسيرة الضيف ومحطاته الوظيفية والقيادية في المؤسسات والهيئات المالية. وتمحور اللقاء الذي أداره رئيس قسم التمويل بكلية الاقتصاد والإدارة الدكتور فارس الثنيان حول عدة محاور ، تضمنت تعزيز الوعي المالي واستعراض إستراتيجيات تطوير رأس المال البشري، كما ناقش الضيف مع الحضور موضوعات تتعلق بالقيادة والتحول في القطاع المالي، والتقنية المالية وسلوك المستثمر، والشباب وصناعة المستقبل. وقدم رئيس مجلس إدارة هيئة سوق المال السعودية عدة نصائح حول تحقيق النجاح، ومشاركة رؤى إستراتيجية حول الأسواق المحلية والدولية، وأهمية تطوير المهارات لمواكبة الاقتصاد العالمي. وشهد اللقاء حضوراً لافتاً من قبل طلاب وطالبات الجامعة ، كما استمع في ختام اللقاء للمناقشات الثرية وتبادل الآراء مع الطلاب والطالبات.

Encontraron muerto a un hombre que estaba en situación de calle en Chubut
content: El frío extremo que golpeó a la cordillera chubutense durante las últimas jornadas volvió a dejar una escena dramática en las calles de Esquel. Un hombre de aproximadamente 50 años murió este domingo por la mañana luego de ser hallado tendido en la vía pública, en el barrio Ceferino, en un contexto atravesado por las bajas temperaturas, el consumo de alcohol y delicados problemas de salud. El hecho ocurrió cerca de las 8:40, cuando efectivos policiales de la Comisaría Primera recibieron un aviso alertando sobre una persona acostada sobre la calle. Al llegar al lugar, los uniformados constataron que se trataba de un hombre conocido por frecuentes intervenciones policiales vinculadas a su situación de vulnerabilidad. Según explicó el jefe de la dependencia, comisario Emir Azócar, el hombre solía permanecer en la vía pública y atravesaba desde hacía tiempo una compleja situación personal y sanitaria. En ese marco, se solicitó de inmediato la presencia de una ambulancia para concretar su traslado al hospital zonal de Esquel. Sin embargo, pese a la rápida intervención, al arribar al centro de salud los médicos confirmaron el fallecimiento. La víctima tenía entre 48 y 50 años y se encontraba en situación de calle, de acuerdo con la información brindada oficialmente por la policía. UN CONTEXTO MARCADO POR LAS TEMPERATURAS BAJO CERO Desde hace varios días, Esquel registra mañanas con temperaturas extremadamente bajas, acompañadas de heladas intensas y condiciones climáticas adversas que afectan especialmente a las personas que permanecen a la intemperie. En ese escenario, el caso generó preocupación por la situación de vulnerabilidad que atraviesan quienes no cuentan con un lugar donde resguardarse. Azócar señaló que el fallecimiento se produjo en un cuadro donde confluyeron distintos factores. Entre ellos, mencionó el frío extremo, el consumo de alcohol y antecedentes médicos complejos que habrían deteriorado seriamente la salud del hombre. “El consumo de alcohol y una historia clínica adversa en cuanto a salud fueron determinantes”, sostuvo el jefe policial al brindar detalles sobre lo ocurrido. Mientras tanto, las actuaciones quedaron a cargo de las autoridades correspondientes, aunque desde la policía indicaron que, en principio, no existirían indicios de criminalidad en el hecho y todo apuntaría a un desenlace asociado al delicado estado general de la víctima y las condiciones climáticas extremas. Какви се шансите Бугарија, која има финансиски тешкотии, воопшто да организира Евровизија?
content: По првата победа на Бугарија на Евровизија, се постави прашањето каде ќе се одржи следното издание на натпреварот и дали Бугарија може да организира еден од најголемите телевизиски настани во Европа. Овогодинешната победничка Дара, која славеше со песната „Бангаранга“, веќе изјави дека сака Евровизијата да дојде во Софија следната година. Сепак, организацијата на толку голем настан за Бугарија може да претставува сериозен финансиски предизвик за таа земја, пишува АПА. Бугарија учествува на Евровизискиот натпревар малку повеќе од две децении, а во последните години неколку пати се повлекуваше од натпреварот поради финансиски причини. Земјата не учествуваше од 2023 до 2025 година, а нејзиното враќање оваа година исто така ѝ донесе историска победа. Мислењата за организацијата на Евровизискиот натпревар 2027 во Бугарија во моментов се поделени. Бугарскиот премиер Румен Радев по победата на Фејсбук изјави дека успехот на Дара е доказ дека Бугарија може да победи на големата европска сцена. „Бугарија ги чека Европа и светот на Евровизискиот натпревар во 2027 година“, напиша тој. Самата Дара наводно рекла по победата: „Следната година Евровизискиот натпревар доаѓа во Софија и ние мора да се подготвиме“. Сепак, дел од јавноста го поставува прашањето колку би чинело организирањето на натпреварот и дали земјата воопшто може да си дозволи таков проект. Денес, организацијата на Евросонг се проценува на помеѓу 20 и 40 милиони евра, во зависност од големината на продукцијата, безбедносните мерки, инфраструктурата и градот домаќин. Во последните години, трошоците значително пораснаа, па на пример, Евросонг во Ливерпул во 2023 година чинеше околу 27 милиони евра, додека изданието во Базел беше проценето на речиси 40 милиони евра. Меѓу најскапите изданија, сè уште се споменува Евросонг во Баку 2012, чија организација наводно чинела повеќе од 60 милиони евра, не сметајќи ја изградбата на салата. Трошоците за натпреварот обично заеднички ги покриваат националната телевизија домаќин, градот и земјата домаќин, спонзорите, продажбата на билети и приходите од телегласање. Арена 8888 Софија, најголемата сала во Софија, се споменува како најверојатна локација за Евровизискиот натпревар. Станува збор за повеќенаменска арена отворена во 2011 година, каде што се одржуваат спортски натпревари и големи концерти. Детскиот натпревар за песна на Евровизија се одржуваше и претходно таму, а ѕвезди како Лејди Гага, Џенифер Лопез, Ерос Рамацоти и Ред Хот Чили Пеперс...

Twisha Sharma Case: ट्विशा छत पर गई, फिर कुछ ऐसा हुआ कि.... देखिए मौत से पहले का CCTV वीडियो
content:
Twisha Sharma Death Mystery: मॉडल Twisha Sharma की संदिग्ध मौत का मामला लगातार चर्चा में बना हुआ है। अब इस केस में सामने आए नए CCTV फुटेज ने कई सवाल खड़े कर दिए हैं। वायरल हो रहे फुटेज में ट्विशा शर्मा को घटना वाली रात छत की ओर जाते हुए देखा जा सकता है। इसके कुछ समय बाद उनके पति समर्थ सिंह और दो अन्य लोग उन्हें सीढ़ियों से नीचे लाते हुए नजर आते हैं। फुटेज सामने आने के बाद परिवार ने एक बार फिर जांच पर सवाल उठाए हैं और मामले की निष्पक्ष जांच की मांग तेज कर दी है।

CCTV फुटेज में क्या दिखा?

घटना से जुड़े CCTV फुटेज में साफ दिखाई दे रहा है कि ट्विशा शर्मा अकेले छत की तरफ जाती हैं। कुछ देर बाद पति समर्थ सिंह और दो अन्य लोग उन्हें नीचे लेकर आते दिखते हैं। फुटेज में यह भी नजर आ रहा है कि सीढ़ियों पर ट्विशा को CPR देने की कोशिश की गई। हालांकि यह स्पष्ट नहीं हो पाया है कि उस समय उनकी हालत क्या थी और उन्हें कब अस्पताल ले जाया गया। पुलिस और जांच एजेंसियां अब इसी फुटेज के आधार पर घटनाक्रम की टाइमलाइन तैयार कर रही हैं।

Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh: CCTV footage of the Twisha Sharma death case in Bhopal.(Video Source: Police) pic.twitter.com/CaV6tMT2AS

— IANS (@ians_india) May 18, 2026

12 मई को मिली थी फंदे से लटकी

जानकारी के अनुसार 12 मई की रात मॉडल ट्विशा शर्मा संदिग्ध परिस्थितियों में फंदे से लटकी मिली थीं। शुरुआती तौर पर इसे आत्महत्या का मामला बताया गया, लेकिन परिवार लगातार इस पर सवाल उठा रहा है। घटना के बाद सोशल मीडिया पर भी यह मामला तेजी से वायरल हुआ और लोग निष्पक्ष जांच की मांग करने लगे।

मां ने लगाए मानसिक प्रताड़ना के आरोप

ट्विशा शर्मा की मां ने मीडिया से बातचीत में गंभीर आरोप लगाए हैं। उन्होंने कहा कि उनकी बेटी मानसिक रूप से प्रताड़ित की जा रही थी। उनका आरोप है कि पति समर्थ सिंह ड्रग्स लेते थे और ट्विशा के साथ अभद्र भाषा का इस्तेमाल करते थे। परिवार का कहना है कि पहले भी ट्विशा के पिता ने समर्थ सिंह से ड्रग्स को लेकर सवाल उठाए थे। इसके बाद कथित तौर पर परिवार पर दबाव बनाया गया और माफी मांगने जैसी बातें कही गईं।

‘हमें जांच पर भरोसा नहीं’

ट्विशा की मां ने कहा कि उन्हें मौजूदा जांच प्रक्रिया पर भरोसा नहीं है। उनका कहना है कि मामले में पहले ही सख्त कार्रवाई होनी चाहिए थी, जिसमें पासपोर्ट सरेंडर और अन्य कानूनी कदम शामिल हैं। परिवार ने यह मांग भी उठाई है कि केस को दिल्ली ट्रांसफर किया जाए और दोबारा पोस्टमार्टम कराया जाए, ताकि मौत की असली वजह सामने आ सके।

Зеленски: Украинските напади сериозно ја погодија руската нафтена индустрија
content: Украинскиот претседател Володимир Зеленски изјави дека руската нафтена индустрија е сериозно погодена од украински далекусежни напади и санкции. Според него, Русија го намалила бројот на активни нафтени бунари и капацитетите за рафинирање. Зеленски предупреди и на знаци на растечка банкарска криза во Русија и зголемен федерален дефицит. Тој тврди дека една руска нафтена компанија затворила околу 400 бунари . Според него, капацитетот за рафинирање на нафта во Русија е намален за најмалку 10 отсто на почетокот од годината, а државниот дефицит достигнал околу 80 милијарди долари . Зеленски додаде дека Украина документира обиди за извоз на жито од Крим и обиди за привлекување инвестиции од западни земји во руските енергетски проекти .

title: Мајка ѝ ја терала на 14 години да прави пластични операции за да биде убавица како сестра ѝ: На нејзиниот изглед сите се восхитуваат, а таа боледува од неизлечива болест
content: Сепак, меѓу бројните славни имиња што прошетаа пред фотографите, посебно внимание привлече Бела Хадид, која со своето појавување уште еднаш докажа зошто важи за една од највлијателните и најубавите жени на модната сцена. Опуштање на јахта пред гламурозното појавување Пред да заблеска пред камерите и собраните новинари, Бела неколку дена уживаше во убавините на Медитеранот. Папараците ја фотографираа како со пријатели одмора на луксузна јахта, се сонча и плива во тиркизните води на Азурниот Брег. Манекенката очигледно сакала да се опушти и да ја наполни енергијата пред големото појавување во Кан. Потемнетиот тен, беспрекорната фигура и самоуверениот став дополнително го нагласија нејзиниот гламурозен изглед кога конечно зачекори на црвениот тепих. Елегантно издание што потсетува на холивудските диви Бела првпат се појави на Канскиот филмски фестивал по повод премиерата на драмата „Garance“, режирана од Жан Ери, додека главната улога во филмот ја толкува француската актерка Адел Егзаркопулос. За оваа пригода Бела избра спектакуларен корсет-фустан од модната куќа „Prada“, изработен специјално по нејзина мерка. Елегантната креација зрачеше со безвременски луксуз и софистицираност, па многумина коментираа дека таков фустан без проблем би можеле да носат легендарната Грејс Кели или принцезата Дајана. Посебно внимание привлече и раскошниот накит од брендот „Chopard“ — дијамантите дополнително го нагласија нејзиниот гламур и направија да изгледа како филмска дива од златната ера на Холивуд. Таа вечер друштво ѝ правеше брат ѝ Анвар Хадид, со кого позираше насмеана и видно расположена. Борба со лајмска болест Зад гламурот, рефлекторите и совршените фотографии се крие и тешка животна борба низ која Бела Хадид поминува со години. Славната манекенка уште во 2012 година дознала дека боледува од лајмска болест, сериозно и хронично заболување што може да остави бројни последици врз организмот. Со текот на годините се соочувала со тешки симптоми како оток, промени на кожата, силен замор, мачнина, несоница, па дури и епизоди на заматена свест. Лекарите предупредуваат дека болеста може да предизвика сериозни оштетувања на органите, вклучувајќи ги и бубрезите, поради што Бела често мора да прима интравенски терапии и да поминува низ исцрпувачки третмани. Иако повеќепати зборуваше за тешките периоди низ кои минува, Бела успеа да остане една од најангажираните и најбараните манекенки на денешницата, поради што многумина ѝ се восхитуваат не само поради убавината, туку и...

title: Минчев – Памер: Продлабочување на партнерството во реформите
content: Министерот за јавна администрација , Горан Минчев, оствари протоколарна средба со амбасадорот на Австрија во Македонија, Мартин Памер. Средбата се одржа во духот на традиционално добрите и пријателски односи меѓу двете држави, со фокус на унапредување на институционалната соработка и поддршка на реформските процеси . Во центарот на разговорите беа реформите во јавната администрација, со посебен акцент на управувањето со квалитет во јавниот сектор и зајакнувањето на административните капацитети. Соговорниците ги истакнаа постигнатите резултати во имплементацијата на Заедничката рамка за оценување (CAF) и важноста од нејзина натамошна системска примена како алатка за подобри институционални перформанси и поголема отчетност. Посебно беше нагласена досегашната успешна соработка со Австрија преку Австриската агенција за развој и KDZ – Центарот за истражување во јавната администрација, вклучително, како и студиската посета на институции во Виена од страна на претставници од Министерството во рамки на TAIEX програмата. Овие активности беа оценети како значаен придонес кон размена на знаења и приближување кон европските практики во управувањето со јавниот сектор. На средбата беше изразена заедничка подготвеност за натамошно продлабочување на соработката, особено преку развивање на поинтегрирана и долгорочна рамка за поддршка на реформите. Двете страни се согласија дека следната фаза на трансформација на јавната администрација бара системски пристап, силна институционална координација и континуирана меѓународна поддршка.

title: Меркел: Лидерите на ЕУ треба сами да разговараат со Путин
content: Меркел: Лидерите на ЕУ треба сами да разговараат со Путин Поранешната германска канцеларка Ангела Меркел оцени дека сегашните европски политичари треба сами да водат разговори со рускиот претседател Владимир Путин, доколку има преговори за Украина и идната безбедносна архитектура во Европа. Зборувајќи на форум организиран од германската телевизиска станица WDR, Меркел потсети на преговорите за договорите од Минск и истакна дека тогашните лидери можеле да разговараат со Путин затоа што имале политички легитимитет и вистинска моќ за донесување одлуки. WDR претходно објави дека интервјуто со поранешната канцеларка ќе биде емитувано како дел од 28-от меѓународен WDR Europaforum. „Можевме да преговараме за решение во Украина со претседателот Путин само затоа што имавме политичка моќ, затоа што бевме шефови на влади“, рече Меркел, осврнувајќи се на периодот кога таа, заедно со другите европски лидери, учествуваше во дипломатските напори околу Минск. Таа додаде дека, под такви околности, дури и не би помислила да го праша медијаторот дали тој ќе оди во Минск и ќе разговара со Путин наместо неа. Според неа, оние што се на власт денес мора да ја преземат одговорноста за ваквите разговори. Изјавата на Ангела Меркел доаѓа во време кога во Европската Унија повторно се отвора прашањето кој, во евентуалниот формат на преговори со Москва, би можел да ги претставува европските интереси. Ројтерс претходно објави дека министрите за надворешни работи на ЕУ ја отфрлиле можноста поранешниот германски канцелар Герхард Шредер, кој беше споменат од Владимир Путин како потенцијален соговорник, да ја игра таа улога. Според медиумите, меѓу имињата што се споменуваат во европските кругови за можна посредничка или преговарачка улога се самата Меркел, финскиот претседател Александар Стаб и поранешниот претседател на Европската централна банка и поранешен италијански премиер Марио Драги. Украинскиот претседател Володимир Зеленски, исто така, рече дека Европа треба да утврди кој конкретно ќе ја претставува во потенцијалните мировни преговори. Меркел , сепак, јасно става до знаење во својата порака дека клучната одговорност не треба да се префрла на поранешните лидери или медијатори, туку на сегашните носители на власт во Европската Унија.

Whirly-Gig Uproar in NE Portland as Neighbors Say Cell Tower Blocked Osprey Nest
content: Neighbors in Northeast Portland say an active osprey nest on a neighborhood cell tower has been deliberately blocked, and residents fear the added hardware is keeping parent birds from reaching their chicks. People who live near the structure in the 5600 block of Northeast 122nd Avenue report seeing a spinning “whirly-gig” device and a fake owl mounted above the nest. Local birders and wildlife photographers say ospreys have used this same tower for years and that the nest currently holds young birds. Neighbors and crews describe obstruction Residents told reporters they found the equipment fixed above the nest, and news crews watched ospreys fly toward the tower only to be turned back by the spinning whirly-gig. Neighbors say the setup looks custom-built to drive the birds away rather than something that ended up there by accident. They add that they are now checking home-security systems and neighborhood cameras to see who installed it. According to KOIN , the station contacted Crown Castle, the Oregon Department of Fish and Wildlife and the Bird Alliance of Oregon for responses. Local and federal protections for active nests The federal Migratory Bird Treaty Act makes it unlawful to disturb or take active nests of protected migratory species, and the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service advises people to steer clear of actions that could harm eggs or nestlings. The City of Portland Bureau of Environmental Services notes that bird nests are protected when they contain eggs or young birds, which in Portland typically occurs in spring and summer. In this case, intentionally blocking adult birds from feeding chicks could prompt a closer look from wildlife authorities. Longtime nesting site, neighbors hunt for culprit Local wildlife photographers told KOIN that a pair of ospreys has been returning to this same tower for more than a decade. Neighbors say the sudden appearance of the obstruction reads as a deliberate move, not a random quirk of the structure. People in the area say they have posted alerts in neighborhood groups and are sharing photos with wildlife advocates to help document what happened. Potential legal exposure Federal penalties can come into play if authorities determine the nest was unlawfully disturbed. The statute at 16 U.S.C. §707, summarized by Justia , outlines violations and penalties connected to the Migratory Bird Treaty Act, including fines and possible jail time for certain offenses. title: IAS Saurabh Vijay Takes Charge as New CEO of UIDAI, Here’s What the Aadhaar Authority Does
Trump Prompts 25th Amendment Demands After Threatening Iran, Posting AI Image of Himself Arresting an Alien
content: Donald Trump prompted fresh calls for the 25th Amendment in Washington on Sunday night after posting an AI-generated image of himself arresting an alien on Truth Social, just hours after issuing a sharp threat to Iran over the war in the Middle East . The reaction came after a string of posts that unsettled critics and supporters alike. Trump had recently warned that 'the clock is ticking' for Iran, language widely read as an escalation as diplomatic efforts stalled. Against that backdrop, the decision to share a stylised fictional image of him in combat gear detaining an extraterrestrial figure only deepened questions about his judgement. Iran Warning Sets Tone Trump's latest controversy began with the Iran warning, delivered in his trademark urgent capitals on Truth Social. He told followers that Tehran's leaders 'better get moving, FAST, or there won't be anything left of them', adding that 'TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE!'. President Trump posts on TruthSocial: For Iran, the Clock is Ticking, and they better get moving, FAST, or there won’t be anything left of them. TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE! President DJT pic.twitter.com/qDsoRzAVZR — Donald J Trump Posts TruthSocial (@TruthTrumpPost) May 17, 2026 The post followed a reported conversation with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, at a moment when Iranian media has accused Washington of failing to offer meaningful concessions. The underlying diplomatic details have not been publicly confirmed by the White House, and Trump's comments once again appeared to run ahead of formal policy briefings. Soon after that warning, Trump shifted attention to a different kind of message. He shared an AI-generated image of himself on a military warship in rough seas, followed by the alien image that quickly drew even more attention. Trump posts AI-generated image of himself walking with alien. pic.twitter.com/pK0KOM09H6 — Daily Mail (@DailyMail) May 18, 2026 The picture showed the President apparently arresting a humanoid alien figure. It also featured distorted, oddly rendered fingers, but the real issue was not the artwork itself. It was the fact that it appeared on the verified account of the sitting President at a moment of high geopolitical tension. Commentators Pile On One social media commentator, posting as 'Hal for NY ', said the episode pointed to something more troubling about Trump's mindset. 'Donald Trump is no longer with us. He has completely left reality, as his postings on Truth Social are becoming more...

title: PM Modi suggests setting up of start-up innovation hub, green innovation hackathon between India and Norway
Amma Canteens | తమిళనాడు సీఎం విజయ్‌ కీలక నిర్ణయం.. అమ్మ క్యాంటీన్ల పునరుద్ధరణకు ఆదేశం
content: చెన్నై: తమిళనాడు సీఎం విజయ్‌ కీలక నిర్ణయం తీసుకున్నారు. ఆ రాష్ట్రంలోని అమ్మ క్యాంటీన్ల నిర్వహణపై (Amma Canteens) అధికారులతో సమీక్షించారు. వాటిని పునరుద్ధరించాలని, న్యాణమైన ఆహారం అందించాలని ఆదేశించారు. 2013లో అన్నాడీఎంకే అధికారంలో ఉన్నప్పుడు నాటి సీఎం జయలలిత పుట్టిన రోజు సందర్భంగా ఫిబ్రవరి 24న ‘అమ్మ’ క్యాంటీన్లను ప్రారంభించారు. మొదట చెన్నైలో ప్రారంభమైన ఈ క్యాంటీన్లు, ఆ తర్వాత పలు నగరాలు, పట్టణాలకు విస్తరించాయి. ప్రజలకు రాయితీ ధరలకు ఆహారాన్ని అందించే ‘అమ్మ’ క్యాంటీన్లు లేదా ‘ఉణవగాలయం’ విశేష ఆదరణ పొందాయి. కాగా, జయలలిత మరణం తర్వాత అధికారంలోకి వచ్చిన డీఎంకే ప్రభుత్వం కూడా ఈ పథకాన్ని కొనసాగించింది. సెమీ అర్భన్‌ ప్రాంతాల్లో కూడా దశలవారీగా మరో 200 క్యాంటీన్లను ప్రారంభిస్తామని ప్రకటించింది. అంతేగాక ఈ పథకం పేరును కూడా డీఎంకే ప్రభుత్వం మార్పు చేయలేదు. మరోవైపు తమిళనాడులో కొత్తగా అధికారంలోని వచ్చిన టీవీకే ప్రభుత్వం కూడా ఆ సంప్రదాయాన్ని కొనసాగించాలని నిర్ణయించింది. సోమవారం సీఎం విజయ్‌ అమ్మ క్యాంటీన్ల నిర్వహణపై ఉన్నతాధికారులతో సమీక్షించారు. మౌలిక సదుపాయాలను మెరుగుపరచాలని, వాటిని పునరుద్ధరించాలని, ప్రజలకు రుచికరమైన, నాణ్యమైన ఆహారం లభించేలా చూడాలని అధికారులను ఆదేశించారు.

Romantic comedy ‘Call of My Life’ grosses N76.5m at cinemas in its opening weekend
content: Romantic comedy movie ‘Call of My Life’ has grossed N76.5 million in its first weekend at the Nigerian Cinemas. The development has again shown Nigeria’s love for romantic movies. According to a Monday post by the NBO , ‘Call of My Life’ opened with N76.5 million and has now grossed a total of N78.2 million over the May 15-17 weekend. For the first time over the past four weeks, Michael Jackson’s biopic ‘Michael’ dropped to second in weekend grossing numbers with N60.5 million (N554.3 million cumulative). With this, analysts have tipped the movie to lead the NBO grossing numbers for the next few weeks after defeating Michael in its opening weekend. Official Movie Cover Image Other movies on the top 10 chart over the weekend include Mortal Kombat 2, N35.5 million (N128.7 million cumulative), The Devil Wears Prada 2, N18.4 million (N150.8 million), The Boy Who Gave N11.7 million (N12.3 million), Efonroye N11 million (N78 million), The Sheep Detective N2.4 million (N8 million), and The Super Mario Galaxy N2.2 million (116.5 million). ‘Call of My Life’ takes on Soluchi (Uzoamaka Power), a hopeless romantic individual still healing from being jilted by her former lover, Kalu (Zubby Michael). At a point when a regular work call puts her in touch with the charming Eli (Andrew Bunting), Soluchi begins to see the possibility of the love story she has always wanted. The film features the presence of a supporting cast, including Nkem Owoh, Patience Ozokwo, Beverly Osu, Justin UG, and the popular comedian Broda Shaggi. It also includes live performances by Johnny Drille and Cobhams Asuquo. Also Read: Michael Jackson’s ‘Michael’ opens strong with ₦123M at NBO . More on ‘Call of My Life’ Directed by Dammy Twitch, ‘Call of My Life’ started screening in Nigerian cinemas on May 15, 2026. Kalu and Soluchi The romantic movie is the first feature film by Dammy Twitch, who has directed videos for leading musicians such as Davido and other top brands. In 2023, he directed ‘I Hate It Here,’ a short drama about domestic violence “ My life has been shaped by love, so choosing a romance story for my first film was instinctive. As it’s my first step into feature filmmaking, I wanted it to reflect my heart. And my heart has always been rooted in love and happiness. I hope the movie finds a place in everyone’s heart ,” Twitch said when the first trailer was released in February. Soluchi is the main character in ‘Call Of My Life’. She is a call centre worker in Nigeria. Her...

الهلال يتصدر قائمة الفرق الأكثر استفادة وتضررًا من قرارات التحكيم في دوري الأرقام
content: شهد الموسم الرياضي الحالي من الدوري السعودي للمحترفين جدلاً واسعًا حول قرارات التحكيم التي أثرت بشكل كبير على نتائج مباريات الأندية الكبرى، لا سيما نادي الهلال الذي برز كأكثر الفرق تأثرًا سواء بالإيجاب أو السلب عبر منافسات الموسم. أثبتت الإحصائيات الفنية تباينًا ملحوظًا في كفاءة التحكيم، مما أثار تساؤلات حول جودة الحكام الأجانب مقابل الحكام المحليين. تحليل أداء الحكام وتأثيره على منافسات الدوري السعودي رصدت الإحصائيات تفوقًا ملحوظًا للصافرة السعودية مقارنةً بالأجنبية، خصوصًا في إدارة المباريات الحساسة التي تحظى بمتابعة جماهيرية كبيرة، الأمر الذي أعاد فتح النقاش حول مدى فعالية الحكام الأجانب الذين استقطبوا لإدارة اللقاءات الحاسمة، بعد تعرضهم لانتقادات حادة بسبب أخطاء مؤثرة غيرت مجريات بعض المباريات. حصاد الهلال من قرارات التحكيم كشف المستشار التحكيمي عبد الله القحطاني أن نادي الهلال تفوق في جانب الحصاد التحكيمي، حيث شهد الفريق نجاحًا في الإفلات من خمس حالات طرد كانت مستحقة، مما جعله يتقاسم المركز الأول مع نادي الاتفاق في قائمة الفرق الأكثر استفادة من إلغاء البطاقات الحمراء ضد لاعبيه، كما تلقى الهلال ركلتي جزاء غير صحيحة لصالحه، إلى جانب حرمان منافسيه من ركلات جزاء صحيحة في مباريات أدارها حكام أجانب. الأندية الأكثر حرماناً من ركلات الجزاء فيما يخص ركلات الجزاء المحرومة، أكد القحطاني تساوي أربعة أندية كبرى في صدارة الأكثر تضررًا من عدم احتساب ركلات جزاء صحيحة داخل مناطق العمليات، وهي الهلال، الاتحاد، القادسية، ونيوم، إذ تعرض كل فريق لحرمان ست ركلات جزاء شرعية خلال الموسم الحالي دون أن يتم الإعلان عن احتسابها رسميًا. تفوق الصافرة السعودية على الأجنبية تقرير عبد الله القحطاني أظهر مفاجأة بارزة، حيث بلغت نسبة الأخطاء المؤثرة في مباريات الحكام الأجانب 24%، في حين كانت نسبة أخطاء الحكام السعوديين أقل بكثير، إذ لم تتجاوز 11% فقط، مما يؤكد تفوق الكادر التحكيمي المحلي في إدارة اللقاءات المهمة بكفاءة ودقة عالية. في ختام هذا التقرير، وضحنا عبر محتوى بلس أن التحكيم يشكل عنصرًا حيويًا في نجاح الدوري السعودي للمحترفين ويستحق دعمًا مستمرًا لتحسين أدائه، خاصةً مع بروز قدرات الحكام المحليين بشكل ملفت، الأمر الذي يعزز الثقة في نزاهة المنافسات ويضمن تحقيق العدالة الرياضية.

Собранието по скратена постапка одобри ново задолжување од 260 милиони евра
content: Собранието на Република Македонија ја изгласа потребата за ново државно задолжување во износ од 260 милиони евра. Одлуката беше донесена да се спроведе по скратена постапка, на предлог на Министерството за финансии. Од страна на власта беше наведено дека станува збор за дел од веќе планирани финансиски активности и дека целта на задолжувањето е да се обезбеди стабилност и ликвидност на државниот Буџет. Заменик-министерот за финансии Николче Јанкулоски во обраќањето пред пратениците истакна дека постапката е целосно транспарентна и дека не се работи за неочекуван потег, туку за однапред предвидена финансиска мерка. Од опозицијата, пак, конкретно од редовите на СДСМ, беше побарано точката да биде повлечена од дневниот ред и да се разгледува по редовна, а не по скратена постапка. Опозициските пратеници изразија загриженост за состојбата на државниот Буџет, за континуираниот раст на јавниот долг, како и за брзината со која се носат вакви значајни финансиски одлуки без подетална и поширока парламентарна расправа. Во текот на седницата беа разгледани и други актуелни теми од различни области. Во спортот, ракометарите беа наградени со 1,5 милиони денари за пласманот на Светското првенство. Во културата беше најавено дека на 2 и 3 јуни во Македонскиот народен театар ќе се одржи премиерата на новиот мјузикл „Као Какао“. Во делот на политиката, Собранието донесе одлука министрите да можат да задржат двојно државјанство. Во општествениот сегмент, Првата детска амбасада „Меѓаши“ алармираше за зголемен број повици од деца кои се соочуваат со ментални здравствени проблеми. The post Собранието по скратена постапка одобри ново задолжување од 260 милиони евра appeared first on Fokus.mk .

Diputados a sesionar esta tarde para aprobar penas más duras contra los extorsionadores
content: Los diputados han sido convocados esta tarde para sesionar y el principal tema a tratar son las reformas al Código Penal y Procesal Penal, anuncia el presidente del Congreso Nacional, Tomás Zambrano. “Tenemos las reformas al Código Penal y al Procesal Penal con el tema de la lucha de las maras y pandillas porque están atentando contra la seguridad del pueblo hondureño, los negocios, los transportistas, los mercados y locatarios”, detalla. Asimismo, Zambrano advierte que en el tema de la extorsión, “hay penas fuertes, penas severas, va lo que es declarar a estos grupos como terroristas, vamos con juzgados especializados, se trabajará de manera coordinada con los operadores de justicia contra la delincuencia”, enfatizó.

title: Post-obesità: lo studio sul mantenimento della perdita di peso
Pepe Chedraui supervisa trabajos de bacheo
content: El presidente municipal de Puebla, José Chedraui Budib, supervisó los trabajos de bacheo que se realizan en distintos puntos de la capital poblana, con el propósito de verificar que las cuadrillas cumplan con los estándares de calidad y las normas establecidas durante las labores de mantenimiento vial . Durante el recorrido, el edil revisó las acciones efectuadas sobre la calle 119 Poniente, entre 5 Retorno 5 B Sur y 3 Sur, en la unidad habitacional Loma Bella, como parte de la estrategia permanente de conservación de vialidades . Las labores forman parte de la campaña BacheAndo Puebla , mediante la cual se atienden reportes ciudadanos y se intervienen puntos prioritarios para mejorar las condiciones de las calles y avenidas de la capital. De acuerdo con el Ayuntamiento, durante la semana las cuadrillas trabajaron en distintas colonias y vialidades con mayor necesidad de atención, reforzando así las acciones de mantenimiento urbano. Con estas jornadas, el Gobierno municipal busca ofrecer calles en mejores condiciones, favorecer una circulación más segura y ordenada , además de mantener seguimiento permanente a las solicitudes ciudadanas relacionadas con bacheo. Por último, el alcalde señaló que la estrategia de atención contempla la evaluación constante de las vialidades con mayor desgaste, especialmente en zonas de alta circulación vehicular. 📌 Esto también te va a interesar, dale click 📌 Carretera a Xalapa tendrá cuatro carriles The post Pepe Chedraui supervisa trabajos de bacheo appeared first on Diario 24 Horas Puebla .
