Meghan Markle Allegedly Faced 'Huge Shock' Over Prince Harry's True Net Worth Amid Billion-Dollar Spending Panics
content: Meghan Markle reportedly experienced a profound shock after discovering the true scale of Prince Harry's network. The claim surfaced in columnist Rob Shuter's Naughty But Nice Substack on Friday, 15 May, which leaned heavily on unnamed insiders to sketch a picture of financial tension inside the Sussex household. The report focused on how Meghan and Prince Harry, now settled in Montecito with their two children, are said to be juggling lofty lifestyle expectations with a more limited and irregular income than some observers might assume. None of the figures cited has been independently verified and should be treated with caution. Prince Harry Is A ‘Lonely Sad Man’ Who Needs Meghan Markle’s ‘Royal Label’, Royal Expert Claims Screenshot Meghan Markle, Prince Harry And A 'Huge Shock' Over Money Shuter reported that Meghan 'genuinely believed Harry was worth hundreds of millions,' only to be disabused of that notion once she saw the numbers. 'When she discovered the actual numbers, it was a huge shock,' one insider claimed. 'Yes, Harry is wealthy — but not 'private jets forever without worrying' wealthy.' That line, if accurate, captures something awkward about the Sussexes' post-royal experiment. They left the confines of the monarchy with global name recognition and a clear appetite for big, glossy deals. Yet, as the same insider suggested, the foundations under that lifestyle may be less solid than the branding implies. Shuter put Prince Harry's net worth at somewhere between $50 million and $70 million, describing it as a 'hefty sum' but also stressing the scale of the couple's outgoings. Those estimates have not been backed up by public financial records, and there is no official comment from the couple's representatives on the figures. The Duke of Sussex has voiced his concern over a ‘deeply troubling’ rise in antisemitism across the UK in a recent opinion piece. Harry underlined the importance of ‘legitimate protest’, explaining that he felt compelled to speak out because, in his view, remaining silent allows ‘hate and extremism to flourish unchecked.' Wikimedia Commons/DoD News Features Billion-Dollar Image, Uneasy Cash Flow For Meghan Markle, Prince Harry Another source quoted by Shuter argued that Meghan and Prince Harry 'spend like a billion-dollar brand.' In other words, the Sussex machine looks and moves like a global luxury label, but, according to this account, its revenue streams do not reliably match the sheen. Their alleged costs are...

ريال مدريد يقترب من توجيه ضربة قوية بتعيين مورينيو مجددًا
content: تتصاعد التكهنات حول مستقبل المدرب البرتغالي جوزيه مورينيو، الذي يشغل حالياً منصب المدير الفني لبنفيكا بعقد يمتد حتى موسم 2026/27، وسط تقارير تؤكد اقترابه من العودة إلى ريال مدريد، ما يفتح صفحة جديدة في مسيرته الحافلة بالإنجازات. عودة مورينيو المرتقبة إلى سانتياغو برنابيو تشير المصادر إلى أن مورينيو وبنفيكا اتفقا على بنود تسمح بإنهاء العقد مبكرًا بعد نهاية الموسم، مما يمهد الطريق لانتقاله إلى ريال مدريد فور انتهاء موسمه مع الفريق البرتغالي، وبحسب التقارير، فإن نادي ريال مدريد مستعد لإنفاق حوالي 7 ملايين يورو لإتمام الصفقة، خاصة بعد تعثّر الفريق في تحقيق الألقاب خلال موسم 2025/26 ورغبته في تجديد الجهاز الفني لتعزيز فرصه في المنافسات القادمة. تفاصيل العقد والإمكانيات الجديدة عند توقيعه مع بنفيكا في سبتمبر 2025، تم تضمين بند يمكّنه من الرحيل خلال عشرة أيام من نهاية الموسم، الذي يعد بمثابة نافذة قانونية لإمكانية عودته إلى ريال مدريد، ويُقال إن العقد الجديد المقترح سيمتد حتى صيف 2028، مع منح مورينيو صلاحيات واسعة في إدارة الانتقالات والاقتراح على المراكز التي يحتاج ريال مدريد إلى تدعيمها. الأهداف المرجوة وخطوات ريال مدريد القادمة من بين اللاعبين المحتمل استقطابهم رودري، برناردو سيلفا، وجوسكو جفارديول، رغم أن إتمام هذه الصفقات يعتمد على سياسة النادي الإسباني والتوافق مع الأندية الحالية لهؤلاء النجوم، ويعكس هذا الاهتمام استراتيجية ريال مدريد لتجديد صفوفه بناءً على رؤية مورينيو لإعادة بناء الفريق وتعزيز قوته التنافسية. سجل مورينيو الحافل وتجربته مع ريال مدريد سابقًا خلال فترة تدريبه لريال مدريد بين 2010 و2013، حقق مورينيو لقب الدوري الإسباني، كأس ملك إسبانيا، كأس السوبر الإسباني، وكسر هيمنة برشلونة بتحقيقه رقماً قياسياً بـ100 نقطة في موسم 2011-2012، وتجربته الغنية تشمل أندية كبيرة مثل بورتو، تشيلسي، إنتر ميلان، مانشستر يونايتد، توتنهام وروما، حيث أحرز دوري أبطال أوروبا مرتين مع بورتو وإنتر ميلان، مما يؤكد جدارة المدرب على قيادة كتيبة الملكي نحو مزيد من النجاحات. تصريحات مورينيو وآخر التطورات بالرغم من تكرار مورينيو تجنبه الحديث مباشرة عن مفاوضات العودة إلى ريال مدريد، إلا أنه أقر بأن وكيله خورخي مينديز أجرى مناقشات مع النادي، مؤكدًا أن عرض تمديد العقد مع بنفيكا هو الوضع الحالي الرسمي، كما أشار بوضوح إلى وجود تحركات وراء الكواليس، مما يثير ترقب الجماهير والمتابعين لمستقبل يشير إلى عودة محتملة لهذا المدرب المرموق إلى برنابيو.

title: Mónica García confía en que se contenga el brote de ébola y ofrece la cooperación de España
Χριστίνα Εξαρχουλέα: Διεθνές ανθρωποκυνητό για τον σύζυγό της – Κατηγορείται για τη δολοφονία της
content: Τα στοιχεία της έρευνας επιβεβαίωσαν τους χειρότερους φόβους. Σχεδόν 9 χρόνια μετά τη μυστηριώδη εξαφάνιση της Χριστίνας Εξαρχουλέα από την Στούπα της δυτικής Μάνης, οι Αρχές κατέληξαν πως η 57χρονη έπεσε θύμα εγκληματικής ενέργειας. Σε βάρος του συζύγου της, που παραμένει άφαντος, εκδόθηκε διεθνές ένταλμα σύλληψης για ανθρωποκτονία από πρόθεση. Αναζητείται ο σύζυγος Οι αντιφάσεις του καταζητούμενου πλέον στις περιγραφές που έδωσε μετά την εξαφάνιση της γυναίκας του, η απόφασή του να εγκαταλείψει την Ελλάδα για τις ΗΠΑ λίγες μόνο μέρες μετά και ενώ οι έρευνες συνεχίζονταν, σε συνδυασμό με τις μαρτυρίες στενών συγγενών και φίλων του ζευγαριού, δρομολόγησαν εξελίξεις. Οι Αρχές θεωρούν πως η Χριστίνα Εξαρχουλέα δολοφονήθηκε και πως ο δράστης φρόντισε να εξαφανίσει τη σορό της. Όπως αναφέρεται στο βούλευμα του Συμβουλίου Πλημμελειοδικών Μεσσηνίας , η Χριστίνα Εξαρχουλέα δολοφονήθηκε στις 24 Οκτωβρίου του 2017, στο σπίτι που έμενε με τον σύζυγό της. Ο χρόνος προσδιορίζεται από τις 16.00 το απόγευμα μέχρι τις 21.00 το βράδυ. Ο καταζητούμενος σύζυγος της Χριστίνας Εξαρχουλέα είχε μιλήσει στην εκπομπή «Φως στο Τούνελ» λίγες μέρες μετά την εξαφάνιση της γυναίκας του. Επέμενε πως την είδε να φεύγει από το σπίτι με μία μαύρη σακούλα σκουπιδιών. Ο ίδιος ανέφερε αρχικά πως δεν υπήρξε τσακωμός με τη σύζυγό του. Αργότερα ωστόσο είπε πως εκείνη την ημέρα οι δυο τους καβγάδισαν, χωρίς όμως τα πράγματα να ξεφύγουν. Ο καταζητούμενος δήλωσε τότε πως η 57χρονη έφυγε από το σπίτι και δεν επέστρεψε ποτέ. Μία σειρά κατοίκων της περιοχής όμως, είχαν πει πως πήγε για ψώνια σε σούπερ μάρκετ και επέστρεψε σπίτι της. Οι αντιφάσεις Ο σύζυγος της Χριστίνας Εξαρχουλέα φρόντιζε από την πρώτη στιγμή να αφήνει αιχμές για τους στενούς συγγενείς της γυναίκας του. Ο ίδιος ορκιζόταν πως όχι μόνο δεν γνώριζε το παραμικρό, αλλά και πως είχε προσπαθήσει να τη βοηθήσει σε δυσκολίες που αντιμετώπιζε. Λίγες μόνο μέρες μετά την εξαφάνισή της, ο σύζυγός της βγάζει διαβατήριο και ταξιδεύει στις ΗΠΑ. Από τότε δεν επέστρεψε ποτέ στην Ελλάδα. Όλα αυτά τα χρόνια ο καταζητούμενος πλέον για τη δολοφονία της συζύγου του, δεν επικοινώνησε ποτέ με τις Αρχές που έκαναν έρευνα για την εξαφάνισή της. Οι συζητήσεις στην τοπική κοινωνία δεν σταμάτησαν ποτέ, από το 2017 μέχρι σήμερα. Η δικηγόρος που...

Homem é esfaqueado dentro de carro de luxo após deixar mulher no local
content: Um homem de 33 anos foi esfaqueado dentro de um carro de luxo no bairro do Butantã, Zona Oeste de São Paulo, no domingo (17). A Polícia Civil investiga o caso como tentativa de homicídio Segundo a Secretaria da Segurança Pública do Estado (SSP-SP), policiais militares foram acionados para atender a ocorrência e encontraram um Audi Q5 na Avenida Valdemar Ferreira com grande quantidade de sangue no interior. O motorista foi atacado ao parar para deixar uma mulher no local. A vítima foi levada para o Hospital Universitário, que fica próximo ao local do crime. Ainda não há atualizações sobre o estado de saúde do homem. A polícia localizou a mulher que estava no carro antes do ataque. Ela prestou depoimento e foi liberada. Um celular encontrado no veículo foi apreendido e vai passar por perícia. O caso foi registrado no 14o Distrito Policial, em Pinheiros.

title: Rafael López Aliaga impugna resultados electorales en Perú
content: Rafael López Aliaga Candidato presidencial Perú Antes que aceptar el escrutinio de la primera vuelta en las elecciones de su país se decantó por impugnarlo sobre la base de un supuesto fraude. Obtuvo un 11.9 % frente al 12.03 de Roberto Sánchez, quien llegó segundo detrás de Keiko Fujimori. Si contara con algún elemento, su queja fuera válida. Pero no tiene ninguno. Puedes leer: Santos Badía llama a universidades a “reinventarse” ante empleos del futuro Rafael Santos Badía Ministro Educación Superior Sus aclaraciones generan confusión sobre l a fusión de los ministerios de Ciencia y Tecnología y de Educación para transformar el sistema de enseñanza , desde el nivel primario hasta el universitario. Con las vueltas que se le han dado al proceso a veces se tiene la impresión de que en verdad se explora otra fórmula distinta de la fusión de las carteras. Antonio Guterres Secretario general de la ONU Que no le hagan mucho caso no significa que tenga que hacer mutis o refugiarse en el silencio. Como diplomático ha evadido las confrontaciones, sobre todo con las decisiones y amenazas del presidente Donald Trump. Pero diálogos como el que defiende frente a la crisis cubana parecen la salida más sensata.

title: Flick renueva con el Barcelona hasta 2028, con otro año opcional
content: *** Flick, de 61 años, ya había expresado durante la temporada su deseo de extender el vínculo con el Barça. El entrenador del Barcelona Hansi Flick ha renovado este lunes su contrato por una temporada más, hasta el 30 de junio de 2028, con la opción de extender el vínculo hasta 2029, según ha anunciado la entidad azulgrana. El técnico alemán ha firmado su nuevo contrato en un acto privado en las oficinas del club en el Spotify Camp Nou, que ha contado con la presencia del presidente en funciones, Rafael Yuste, el presidente electo, Joan Laporta, y el director deportivo, Anderson de Souza ‘Deco’, entre otros. Flick, de 61 años, ya había expresado durante la temporada su deseo de extender el vínculo con el Barça, que a priori será su última experiencia en los banquillos, y el pasado 12 mayo confirmó públicamente que el acuerdo con el club estaba cerrado. Tras ganarlo todo con el Bayern Múnich (2019-2021) y dirigir a la selección de Alemania (2021-2023), que no superó la fase de grupos en el Mundial de 2022, el preparador germano recaló en el Barcelona en el verano de 2024 para reemplazar al destituido Xavi Hernández, después de una temporada marcada por la inestabilidad y los malos resultados. Sin embargo, la fórmula de Flick cuajó de inmediato en la capital catalana. En su primera temporada, el Barça ganó el triplete nacional y se quedó a las puertas de la final de la Liga de Campeones, y en esta segunda campaña ha levantado la Supercopa de España y LaLiga. Cinco títulos de ocho posibles. Más allá de los trofeos, el preparador germano ha instaurado en el equipo un modelo de juego ofensivo y dinámico que ha convencido a la plantilla, ha ilusionado a la afición y ha devuelto al Barça a la élite el fútbol europeo. Con escaso margen para fichar por las limitaciones económicas del club, Flick ha confiado en La Masia y ha extraído mejor versión de la mayor parte de sus futbolistas, combinando la experiencia de jugadores como Robert Lewandowski o Raphael Dias ‘Raphinha’, con el crecimiento de jóvenes como Lamine Yamal, Fermín López, Pedro González ‘Pedri’ o Pau Cubarsí, entre otros. Antes de la firma, Flick, el capitán Ronald Araujo, el presidente en funciones Rafael Yuste y el presidente electo Joan Laporta han depositado en el museo del club los dos trofeos que el equipo ha ganado esta temporada, la Supercopa de España y LaLiga. EFE La entrada Flick renueva con el Barcelona hasta 2028, con otro año opcional se...

Fox debuta en Costa Rica con unos bombazos, ¿cuáles son las primeras novedades en la pantalla?
content: Fox debutó en la pantalla de su televisión este lunes en lugar de Tigo Sports y uno de sus primeros grandes cambios, además de lo evidente con el cambio de logo, que es el conocido a nivel internacional, pero ahora en nuestro país. El espacio de Tigo Sports Radio desapareció, y ahora el programa se llamará La Redacción e inicia en lugar de las 8:30 a.m.; ahora es media hora antes y ahora acabará a las 10. José Alberto Montenegro inició el espacio dando algunos anuncios, como lo es el del Mundial de Norteamérica 2026, en el que Fox dará los 104 partidos de la justa más importante del fútbol. A las 5 de la tarde, el programa de noticias deportivas ahora tendrá el nombre de Diario Fox y tendrá una hora de duración. En este espacio también se hizo el anuncio de que en la pantalla de Fox Costa Rica, este martes darán la Premier League con el juego entre el Bournemouth ante Manchester City desde las 12:30 en un juego clave en la lucha por la disputa del cetro inglés; el duelo arrancará a la 1 de la tarde, hora tica. https://www.lateja.cr/teleguia/deportes/estrella-del-fc-barcelona-se-perdera-mundial-con/OFQVHPGUGVDTNGWHRR2WJY4RH4/story/ Sumado a la liga de Inglaterra, se hizo el anuncio de que también darán la Ligue 1 de Francia, en la que el actual campeón de Europa, PSG, es el dominador de este campeonato. Otro de los cambios es que ahora en las redes sociales salen como Somos Fox CR, y según anunciaron, el cambio irá cambiando poco a poco en las diversas plataformas. En La Redacción mencionaron que con el paso de los días se seguirán dando más anuncios con la llegada de Fox a la pantalla de nuestro país.

Super Kings lose three quick wickets, reach 91 runs in 10 overs vs Sunrisers
content: In the IPL 2026 match against Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH), Chennai Super Kings (CSK) have reached the score of 91 runs for the loss of three wickets in 10 overs at the MA Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai. Having opted to bat first, wicketkeeper-batsman Sanju Samson scored 27 runs in 13 balls, with the help of five boundaries and a maximum. Urvil Patel departed after registering 13 runs in eight balls, including two maximums. Kartik Sharma also delivered a crucial knock of 32 runs in 19 balls. His knock included three boundaries and two maximums. Skipper Ruturaj Gaikwad and Dewald Brevis are unbeaten at the crease. Hyderabad`s captain Pat Cummins has managed to pick up two wickets. Sakib Hussain has also bagged one wicket. Nitish Kumar Reddy, Praful Hinge, Eshan Malinga, and Shivang Kumar are yet to claim their first wicket. Earlier, CSK`s skipper Ruturaj won the toss and elected to bat first against SRH in Chennai. The Super Kings entered the clash with one change, where Akeal Hosein came in place of Gurjapneet Singh. After winning the toss, CSK `s skipper Ruturaj said, "We are looking to bat first. Well, it`s nothing complicated, it`s just simple for us. Take it one game at a time, look to win this one, look to start well, look to assess the conditions well and put your best foot forward. (Asking about the pressure in this game) Well, nothing, not as such, it`s just that we have to respect conditions and choose what`s the best for the conditions. And yes, I think batting first looks good here now. (Is MS here?) He`s still here, but he`s not fit enough to play this game. Hopefully we win this one and you`ll have a low in the last game. We got just one change. Akeal comes in for Gurjapneet". IPL 2026, Chennai Super Kings vs Sunrisers Hyderabad: Confirmed Playing XIs Chennai Super Kings: Sanju Samson (WK), Ruturaj Gaikwad (C), Urvil Patel, Kartik Sharma, Dewald Brevis, Shivam Dube, Prashant Veer, Akeal Hosein, Noor Ahmad, Anshul Kamboj, Spencer Johnson. Sunrisers Hyderabad: Abhishek Sharma, Ishan Kishan (WK), Heinrich Klaasen, Salil Arora, Ravichandran Smaran, Nitish Kumar Reddy, Pat Cummins (C), Shivang Kumar, Eshan Malinga, Sakib Hussain, Praful Hinge.

title: Radiografía digital: Internet llega al hogar de los morelenses pero sigue la brecha
content: Cuernavaca, Morelos.- El estado mantiene una amplia adopción de internet, aunque aún enfrenta retos importantes para cerrar la brecha digital en las comunidades. Así lo arrojan los resultados de la Encuesta Nacional sobre Disponibilidad y Uso de Tecnologías de la Información en los Hogares (ENDUTIH), elaborada por el INEGI. En el marco del Día Mundial de Internet, trascendió que en Morelos la cifra de conectados asciende a un millón 562 mil 471 personas, reflejando la importancia del uso de internet. Los principales vicios y el uso de internet en Morelos El principal motivo para navegar entre los usuarios de la entidad es la comunicación, una actividad que fue reportada por el 93.5% de los ciudadanos consultados. A esta tendencia le siguen el entretenimiento con el 89.3%, el acceso a las redes sociales con 88.9%, y la búsqueda de información general con el 88.2%. La educación o capacitación digital también ocupa un lugar importante en la vida de los estudiantes, alcanzando un sólido 80.6% de las preferencias de navegación. ¿Desde dónde se conectan los ciudadanos? La encuesta detalla que el hogar continúa siendo el principal punto de acceso al uso de internet en Morelos, registrando un contundente 95.7% de las menciones. Abajo se ubican las conexiones móviles con el 55.7%, los espacios laborales con el 42% y las visitas a las viviendas de otras personas con el 40%. Otras actividades con menor porcentaje son el acceso a contenidos audiovisuales, las tareas escolares, las compras en línea, los trámites de gobierno y las operaciones bancarias. El reto de la brecha digital en los municipios A pesar del crecimiento en las zonas urbanas, el reporte advierte que no toda la población cuenta con acceso o las habilidades digitales necesarias hoy en día. Los retos persisten para los sectores vulnerables que no pueden costear una red de navegación o carecen de los dispositivos tecnológicos básicos en sus hogares.

राजावादी मुद्दालाई थप सशक्त पार्दै राप्रपा
content: आगामी महाधिवेशनलाई केन्द्रमा राख्दै राष्ट्रिय प्रजातन्त्र पार्टी (राप्रपा) भित्र राजनीतिक सक्रियता तीव्र हुन थालेको छ। राजधानीमा सोमबार आयोजित नेताहरूको भेलाले पार्टीलाई एकताबद्ध बनाउँदै राजतन्त्र र हिन्दु राष्ट्रको मुद्दालाई स्पष्ट रूपमा अघि बढाउन सक्ने नेतृत्वलाई समर्थन गर्ने निष्कर्ष निकालेको छ। नेता जगत गौचनको संयोजकत्वमा सम्पन्न भेलामा सहभागी नेताहरूले महाधिवेशन केवल नेतृत्व चयनको प्रक्रिया नभई पार्टीको वैचारिक दिशा तय गर्ने अवसर भएको धारणा राखेका थिए। उनीहरूले राजतन्त्र, हिन्दुत्व र राष्ट्रवादको मुद्दामा दृढ अडान राख्ने व्यक्तिलाई नेतृत्वमा ल्याउनुपर्नेमा जोड दिएका छन्। भेलापछि गौचनले पार्टीलाई विभाजनतर्फ होइन, एकढिक्का बनाउँदै महाधिवेशनमा लैजानुपर्ने आवश्यकता औँल्याए। उनले अहिले कुनै व्यक्तिको नाम सार्वजनिक रूपमा अघि नसारिए पनि “प्रखर राजावादी र राष्ट्रवादी छवि भएको नेतृत्व” निर्माणमा सहमति बनेको बताए। बैठकमा करिब दुई दर्जनभन्दा बढी केन्द्रीय सदस्य तथा नेताहरूको सहभागिता रहेको जनाइएको छ। भेलामा नेता भरत रायमाझी, प्रकाशजङ्ग कार्की, प्रल्हाद शाह, मीनबहादुर शाही, गोपीचन्द्र शर्मा, केदार कोइराला र पूजा राणालगायत सहभागी थिए। सहभागी नेताहरूले पार्टीभित्र युवापुस्ताका सक्रिय र स्पष्ट विचार भएका राजावादी नेताहरूलाई नेतृत्वको अग्रपङ्क्तिमा ल्याउनुपर्ने आवाज उठाएका थिए। उनीहरूको धारणा अनुसार अबको नेतृत्व केवल पदकेन्द्रित नभई पार्टीको मूल सिद्धान्त र जनभावनालाई गन्तव्यसम्म पुर्‍याउन सक्षम हुनुपर्छ। राप्रपाभित्र महाधिवेशनको मिति छिट्टै घोषणा गर्न दबाब बढिरहेका बेला पार्टीले भने अहिलेसम्म औपचारिक मिति तय गर्न सकेको छैन। यसअघि जेठ १ गते बसेको केन्द्रीय कार्यसमिति बैठकले महाधिवेशनको कार्यतालिका तयार पार्न समिति गठन गर्ने निर्णय गरेको थियो।

title: Tania Valentina encabeza capacitación para la defensa política de las mujeres en Morelos
content: Amacuzac, Morelos.- El Partido del Trabajo (PT) en Morelos concluyó con éxito en Amacuzac el Taller Estatal "Derecho Político Electoral de las Mujeres: evolución y defensa", actividad enfocada en fortalecer la participación y la capacitación política de cara a los próximos procesos electorales. La diputada local Tania Valentina Rodríguez Ruiz destacó la importancia de generar espacios de aprendizaje, reflexión y participación para los morelenses en todas las regiones. La legisladora señaló que este tipo de talleres permiten fortalecer la estructura y organización del partido en distintas zonas del estado a través de la formación de los ciudadanos. Estructuras se alistan en el estado La legisladora agradeció la participación de quienes asistieron al encuentro, así como el respaldo del presidente municipal de Amacuzac, Noé Reynoso Nava, por la anfitrionía durante el desarrollo de las actividades. Asimismo, reconoció el apoyo del regidor Santiago Méndez en la organización del taller, el cual reunió a militantes y ciudadanos interesados en temas relacionados con la capacitación política y las leyes electorales. Los organizadores informaron que la respuesta de los habitantes de la zona sur fue positiva, sumando a más personas a los trabajos internos del instituto político. Rumbo a los próximos procesos electorales De acuerdo con los liderazgos del PT Morelos, estas acciones forman parte de una estrategia integral de formación y fortalecimiento partidista ante las elecciones que se aproximan en la entidad. Con estos foros se busca que los afiliados cuenten con las herramientas necesarias para la defensa del voto y la promoción de la participación ciudadana en los municipios. Las autoridades del partido adelantaron que las jornadas de concientización e instrucción continuarán realizándose en las distintas demarcaciones del territorio morelense durante los próximos meses.

title: Chembur man dies in hit-and-run after autorickshaw makes sudden U-turn in Mulund
content: A 32-year-old man from Chembur died in a hit-and-run accident in Mulund East in Mumbai after an autorickshaw allegedly made a sudden wrong U-turn and collided with his motorcycle near the Airoli Bridge, official said on Monday. The deceased has been identified as Mital Patil, a restaurant manager. He lived in Chembur with his elder brother Karan (35), a civil engineer. According to Navghar police, the incident took place around 1:15 pm when Patil was riding his motorcycle towards Thane via the Airoli Bridge. An unidentified autorickshaw allegedly took a sudden wrong U-turn on Navghar Road and hit his bike. The impact threw Patil onto the road, causing severe head injuries. The autorickshaw driver reportedly fled the scene immediately after the collision. Victim declared dead at hospital Patil was rushed to Veer Savarkar Hospital in Mulund East. His brother Karan said he received a call around 1:30 pm informing him about the accident and the hospital transfer . When he reached the hospital at around 2:05 pm, doctors told him that Patil had been declared dead at 1:55 pm due to serious head injuries. Police case and investigation Navghar police have registered an FIR against an unknown autorickshaw driver under charges of rash and negligent driving causing death, along with relevant provisions of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita and Motor Vehicles Act . A search has been launched to trace the absconding driver, police said.

Llantas abandonadas en Morelos van al Centro de Economía Circular para frenar el dengue
content: Cuernavaca, Morelos.- Las autoridades ambientales llamaron a los ayuntamientos de Morelos a cumplir con la disposición adecuada de neumáticos viejos para evitar el dengue en la entidad. Los municipios deben trasladar estos desechos al Centro Estatal de Economía Circular "Transformación de Llantas", como una medida urgente para prevenir riesgos sanitarios y ambientales en las colonias. Con esto se busca frenar la proliferación del mosquito Aedes aegypti, transmisor de enfermedades graves, mediante el retiro oportuno de los neumáticos que la gente deja en las calles. Nuevas reglas para el desecho de neumáticos Se notificó oficialmente a los alcaldes sobre la actualización del reglamento de la Ley de Residuos Sólidos, que establece nuevas obligaciones para los municipios en el manejo de estos materiales. Hasta el momento, siete ayuntamientos presentaron informes sobre acciones concretas de acopio, entre ellos Temixco, Atlatlahuacan, Yautepec, Puente de Ixtla, Xochitepec, Tepoztlán y Axochiapan. Asimismo, 14 demarcaciones ya realizaron la entrega de estos desechos en el centro estatal, destacando Amacuzac, Emiliano Zapata, Mazatepec, Miacatlán, Tetecala, Tlaltizapán, Coatetelco, Totolapan y Hueyapan. Operativos obligatorios contra el dengue Aunque la norma no establece una periodicidad rígida, los alcaldes deben realizar jornadas de limpieza al menos una vez al mes para evitar el dengue y la acumulación de basura. Los neumáticos abandonados representan un peligro mayor ante la cercanía de la temporada de lluvias, ya que generan problemas de imagen urbana, tapan los servicios públicos y provocan incendios. El uso del centro estatal no tiene ningún costo para los ayuntamientos, lo que representa un ahorro importante de dinero frente a los gastos por disponer de ellos en los rellenos sanitarios. Participación de los ciudadanos y llanteras Los ciudadanos también pueden participar de forma directa llevando de manera gratuita hasta cuatro piezas de vehículos particulares a las instalaciones estatales. En el caso de los dueños de vulcanizadoras y llanteras, los encargados deberán cumplir de forma obligatoria con el traslado y acreditar un plan de manejo de residuos ante las dependencias encargadas.

HONOR Mocks Trump Mobile T1 as a 'Chinese Made Gold Phone' Device
content: The whole selling point of the Trump Mobile T1 smartphone was that it was supposed to be “Made in America.” That’s what the company had promised or hinted at at the start, and now it looks like HONOR has decided to take a dig at the Trump Mobile T1, playfully joking that it’s a “Chinese made gold phone.” HONOR makes fun of the Trump Mobile T1 In a post on its X account, HONOR took a not-so-subtle dig at the Trump Mobile T1. The company’s social media caption reads, “If you are in the market for a Chinese made Gold phone, may we suggest something a little more... premium? ” The post was accompanied by an image of the HONOR Magic 8 Pro in its Sunrise Gold finish, which looks a lot better and classier than that gaudy gold-like finish of the T1. But hey, personal preference, right? If you are in the market for a Chinese made Gold phone, may we suggest something a little more... premium? https://t.co/iNwjmD1bOs pic.twitter.com/KNK35DfOmh — HONOR UK (@UKHonor) May 15, 2026 However, there’s no denying there is some truth in what HONOR said. Like we said earlier, the T1 was initially supposed to be a phone made in America. However, the irony was that when the phone was first announced, many were quick to point out that it was a rebranded version of the REVVL 7 Pro 5G made by Wingtech, a Chinese company. The company later removed references to it being made in the US. More recently, it looks like the phone is being assembled in the US. That’s similar to how Apple brands its products as being designed in California, but it’s still made in China. However, Trump Mobile CEO Pat O’Brien said that future phones will feature components primarily made in the States. That’s still kind of vague, but oh well. Shipping out now...we hope The Trump Mobile T1 phone was supposed to have started shipping out last week. The phone was announced last year, but there were a bunch of delays. This led to some concerns that the phone was vaporware. To make matters worse, Trump Mobile had taken $100 deposits from customers hoping to reserve their devices. But according to O’Brien, one of the reasons for the delay was due to the company attempting to have the phone made stateside. But as we said, it is now only being assembled in the US. The post HONOR Mocks Trump Mobile T1 as a 'Chinese Made Gold Phone' Device appeared first on Android Headlines .

title: Der Aufstieg von Elversberg und die Grenzen des menschlichen Geistes
Bridge on Liberty Road in Chelsea closing for repairs on May 26
content: By TYLER RALEY | Staff Writer CHELSEA – As the second half of the month May rolls on, many residents in the city of Chelsea will experience a significant change to their daily driving routines as one route will be closed for an extended period of time. Beginning on Tuesday, May 26, the bridge that sits on Liberty Road behind Liberty Baptist Church will be completely shut down in order for construction to be done on the bridge and for other repairs to be made. The bridge, which is crossed by many cars that turn off of County Road 47, will be completely inaccessible for the foreseeable future due to the repairs and construction, meaning residents will have to find alternate routes to get to where they are going. Shelby County Engineer David Willingham said during the most recent meeting of the Shelby County Commission on Monday, May 11 that the county is continuing to finalize notices and route alterations with essential services so that jobs can still be done. “We planned that around school being complete for the year,” Willingham said. “We’ll work with the post office and garbage providers and people like that to make sure they know what’s going on.” According to a notice on the city of Chelsea’s Facebook page, the construction and repairs, the closure is anticipated to be in place through the early portion of August. However, when the city knows the exact extent of the entire section that will be worked on, another post will be put out for residents to see. Willingham had echoed that statement during the meeting, saying the county is giving those who are working on the bridge the summer break before school starts back to get the job done. “It could be closed as long as 10 weeks, like August 2, so we’ll give them that school’s out window (to get things complete),” Willingham said. As a result of the extended closure, the city asks that residents please plan for additional travel times and have alternate routes ready once the bridge closes. The other major alternate entrance to Liberty Road can be accessed from County Road 433. In addition, those with questions about the project or closure are asked to contact the Shelby County Highway Department at 205-669-3880.

Estudante é autuado em flagrante por homicídio após acidente com morte na Assis Chateaubriand
content: Um estudante de 19 anos foi autuado em flagrante por homicídio culposo na direção de veículo automotor, após se envolver num acidente com morte de um pescador de 63 anos, no km 86 da rodovia Assis Chateaubriand em Barretos, por volta das 10h45 de sábado (16). Os policiais rodoviários Pedro Borges e Fernando Silva apresentaram a ocorrência, sendo apurado que o estudante residente em Bebedouro, dirigia um GM Classic no sentido Guaíra – Barretos, quando no km 86 sentiu um mal estar e acabou colidindo com uma moto Honda Titan, conduzida pelo pescador residente em Miguelópolis que trafegava no sentido Barretos – Guaíra. O motociclista não resistiu aos ferimentos e veio a óbito no local. O estudante não ficou ferido e durante depoimento na delegacia alegou que ter sofrido um apagão, disse que não se recordava do que havia acontecido no momento do acidente. O delegado Marcelo Gambi Alves determinou o acionamento da Perícia Técnica e do IML (Instituto Médico Legal), e autuou o estudante em flagrante pelo crime de homicídio culposo na direção de veículo automotor e arbitrou a fiança no valor de R$1.621,00. Foi entendido que alegação do condutor do carro, de que ele sofreu um mal súbito ou desmaio momentâneo, é unilateral e não pode ser verificada na etapa de cognição no Plantão Policial, então é insuficiente para a exclusão do crime. Também que o acidente ocorreu em faixa continua na qual era proibida a ultrapassagem na mão de direção do condutor do carro, o que caracteriza culpa por imprudência. Imagens indicam que não houve frenagem, o que sugere possível distração ou sonolência do condutor. E por fim não foi vislumbrada a incidência da benesse contida no art. 301 do Código de Trânsito, visto que o autor não teve postura proativa, no sentido de acionar o socorro ou unidades de resgate. O estudante pagou a fiança e foi liberado para responder o processo em liberdade. Moto que era conduzida pela vítima após acidente The post Estudante é autuado em flagrante por homicídio após acidente com morte na Assis Chateaubriand appeared first on O Diário Interativo Online .

“Quiero ser una mamá leona y fiestera”, dijo la Miss Tanga
content: Dahiana Zelinsky encendió la semana de las madres con una confesión bien hot: “Quiero ser una mamá leona y fiestera”. La sexy Miss Tanga habló sin filtros sobre maternidad, noches intensas y su lado más atrevido. -¿Cómo te imaginás como mamá? -Me veo súper protectora, de esas mamás leonas que defienden a sus hijos con uñas y dientes. Pero también quiero seguir disfrutando mi vida, salir, bailar y sentirme sexy sin perder mi esencia. -¿La maternidad te frenaría la vida nocturna? -Para nada. Obvio que las prioridades cambian, pero una mujer no deja de ser mujer por ser mamá. Yo quiero seguir siendo fiestera, arreglarme, ponerme divina y salir a romper corazones. -¿Te gustaría tener muchos hijos? -Con uno o dos ya sería feliz, porque quiero dedicarles tiempo y amor. Pero tampoco voy a mentir... también quiero seguir teniendo tiempo para mí y para mi lado más atrevido. -¿Cómo sería tu pareja ideal para formar familia? -Un hombre seguro, divertido y apasionado. No podría estar con alguien celoso o aburrido. Necesito un compañero que entienda mi personalidad explosiva. -¿Seguirías usando looks sensuales siendo mamá? -¡Obvio! Ser mamá no significa vestirse apagada. Me encanta sentirme sexy y eso no va a cambiar jamás. Si tengo que ir al súper en mini short, voy feliz. -¿Cuál sería la enseñanza más importante para tus hijos? -Que sean auténticos y nunca vivan pendientes del qué dirán. Yo aprendí a disfrutar mi cuerpo y mi personalidad sin culpa. -¿Sos celosa en el amor? -Sí, un poquito tóxica puedo ser... pero porque soy intensa. Cuando amo, me entrego completa y también espero mucha pasión del otro lado. -¿Qué parte de tu personalidad enamora más? -Mi actitud. Sé que tengo un lado muy sensual, pero también soy divertida y espontánea. Conmigo nunca te aburrís. La entrada “Quiero ser una mamá leona y fiestera”, dijo la Miss Tanga se publicó primero en Popular .

title: Obezite: Küresel Bir Salgın ve Etkileri
content: Dr. Musluh Hakseven: "Obezite, sadece bir kilo meselesi değil" Memorial Diyarbakır Hastanesi Onkolojik Cerrahi Bölümünde görev yapan Cerrahi Onkoloji ve Genel Cerrahi Uzmanı Dr. Musluh Hakseven, obeziteyi yalnızca kilo fazlalığı olarak görmenin büyük bir hata olduğunu vurguladı. Hakseven, obezitenin giderek büyüyen ve tüm toplum kesimlerini etkileyen küresel bir salgın haline geldiğini belirtti. Dünya Genelinde Obezite Sorunu Dr. Hakseven, "Dünya genelinde yüz milyonlarca insan obeziteyle yaşıyor. Bu artışın hız kesmemesi ise daha da çarpıcı bir sorun olarak karşımıza çıkıyor," dedi. Obezitenin artık sadece birkaç kilo fazlalığı değil, yaşam süresini kısaltan ve yaşam kalitesini düşüren bir hastalık haline geldiğinin altını çizdi. Obezite ve Sağlık İlişkisi "Toplumda yaygın bir yanlış anlama var. Birçok kişi obeziteyi aşırı yeme ya da irade eksikliği ile açıklıyor, ama gerçek çok daha karmaşık," diyen Hakseven, genetik yapı, hormonal denge ve çevresel faktörlerin de önemli rol oynadığını belirtti. Şu anda yaşanan şehir yaşantısı, çalışılan şartlar ve gıda endüstrisinin sunduğu seçenekler, kilo alımını kolaylaştıran bir ortam sağlıyor. Obezitenin Ciddi Hastalıklarla İlişkisi Dr. Hakseven, obezitenin kalp hastalıkları, hipertansiyon ve tip 2 diyabet gibi birçok ciddi hastalığa kapı araladığını vurguladı. Ayrıca bazı kanser türleri ile olan bağlantısı da artık net bir şekilde kabul edilmektedir. Bu durumun, sorun sadece dış görünüş değil, yaşam süresi ve sağlık açısından ciddi sonuçları olduğunu gösterdiğini ifade etti. Çocuklar ve Obezite Sorunu "Eskiden yalnızca yaşlılara özgü bir sorun gibi görülen obezite, artık çocukluk çağında da görülmeye başlandı," diyen Hakseven, teknolojinin etkileri ve beslenme alışkanlıklarındaki değişimlerin çocukları daha erken yaşta risk altına soktuğunu ifade etti. Obez bireylerin ileride obez yetişkinler olma ihtimalleri, gelecekteki sorunları daha da büyütmekte. Psikolojik ve Sosyal Etkileri Dr. Hakseven, obezitenin yalnızca fiziksel değil, aynı zamanda ruhsal bir yük de taşıdığını ve obez bireylerin sık sık toplumda damgalanma ile karşılaştığını belirtti. Bu durum, depresyon ve sosyal izolasyonu beraberinde getiriyor. Ayrıca, obezitenin ekonomik maliyetleri, sağlık harcamaları ve iş gücü kaybı gibi sorunları da büyütmektedir. title: Energia da fonti rinnovabili, Sì della Regione ad autorizzazioni più veloci
content: Autorizzazioni ambientali più veloci per le aziende che vogliono produrre in Sicilia energia da fonti rinnovabili . Lo stabilisce la norma, di iniziativa governativa, in materia di Paur, il Provvedimento autorizzatorio unico regionale, approvata nei giorni scorsi all’Ars . Savarino: “Rese più snelle le procedure in un settore di fondamentale importanza” L’assessore regionale al Territorio e ambiente Giusi Savarino commenta la norma : “Agendo nell’ambito del Testo unico nazionale sulle rinnovabili e secondo i principi della disciplina eurounitaria, abbiamo reso più snelle le procedure in un settore che è di fondamentale importanza per la nostra Isola, anche nell’interesse delle future generazioni. Investire da noi adesso sarà più competitivo perché permetteremo agli imprenditori di risparmiare dai sei ai nove mesi di tempo di attesa prima di cominciare a produrre, ma sempre nel rispetto della tutela degli ecosistemi, della biodiversità e del paesaggio”. Savarino prosegue : “Il nostro obiettivo, attraverso la semplificazione e la riduzione dei tempi della burocrazia, è sempre quello di favorire la crescita e lo sviluppo della nostra economia”. Il parametro regionale sugli obiettivi europei Alla Sicilia, in termini di ripartizione regionale degli obiettivi europei sulle energie rinnovabili ( burden sharing ), è stato assegnato un parametro di circa 10,5 gigawatt di capacità che deve essere installata sull’Isola entro il 2030. Francesco Colianni, l’assessore regionale all’Energia e ai servizi di pubblica utilità, sottolinea : “Un obiettivo che siamo certi raggiungeremo e supereremo considerando che possiamo contare su circa 3 gw già installati e oltre 10,7 gw già autorizzati, mentre ulteriori 30 gw si trovano ancora nella fase istruttoria. Con questa procedura semplificata, per cui basterà l’Autorizzazione unica per avviare la produzione di energia pulita e permetterà di confrontarsi con un unico interlocutore istituzionale, la Sicilia si conferma come una delle regioni italiane alla guida della transizione energetica del Paese”. title: Шакира ќе добие поврат од 55 милиони евра за незаконски наплатен данок
content: Шпанскиот национален суд им наложи на даночните власти во земјата да ѝ вратат 55 милиони евра на пејачката Шакира откако пресуди дека парите незаконски ѝ биле наплатени во спор околу висината на нејзините даноци. Високиот национален суд ја ослободи колумбиската пејачка од обвинение за даночна измама и му наложи на Министерството за финансии да ѝ ги врати парите плус камата. Според Судот, даночните власти не успеале да докажат дека таа поминала 183 дена во Шпанија во 2011 година – минимум потребен за жителите да платат данок на личен доход таму. Судот утврдил дека таа поминала 163 дена во Шпанија во таа финансиска година – 20 дена помалку од прагот за да биде класифицирана како резидент за даночни цели. За да избегне судење за поширок случај на измама, Шаќира во 2018 година склучи посебна спогодба со шпанската даночна агенција. Денешната одлука на Судот, таа ја посвети на илјадниците обични луѓе кои се борат да ја докажат својата невиност. Шакира изјави дека судот ја исправил неправдата по осум години „ брутално јавно таргетирање, оркестрирани кампањи за уништување на угледот и бессони ноќи“ што влијаеле на нејзиното здравје и на нејзиното семејство. Даночната агенција соопшти дека ќе се жали до Врховниот суд и дека нема да се изврши никаква исплата до конечната пресуда. The post Шакира ќе добие поврат од 55 милиони евра за незаконски наплатен данок appeared first on telma.com.mk .

'পাঁচ-ছ’মাস কেঁদেছি, ২৫ বছর পরেও...', শেফালির সঙ্গে বিচ্ছেদ নিয়ে কী বললেন হর্ষ?
content: হিন্দি ধারাবাহিক ‘হসরতেঁ’র সেট। তরুণ অভিনেতা হর্ষ ছায়া আর সদ্য থিয়েটার স্কুল থেকে আসা শেফালি শাহ — সহকর্মী থেকে প্রেম, প্রেম থেকে বিয়ে। সাল ১৯৯৪। কিন্তু সেই ভালবাসার গল্প মাত্র ছ’বছর টিকেছিল। ২০০০ সালে শেফালি আর হর্ষের বিচ্ছেদ হয়। সাম্প্রতিক সাক্ষাৎকারে হর্ষ জানালেন, দীর্ঘ পঁচিশ বছর পরেও সেই স্মৃতি কোথাও যেন কাঁটার মতো খচখচ করে। হর্ষের কথায়, “আট-ন’মাস আগে থেকেই বুঝতে পারছিলাম, এই সম্পর্ক শেষের দিকে এগোচ্ছে। ও যখন বলল, ‘আর তোমার সঙ্গে থাকতে পারব না, সত্যি বলতে, আমি প্রস্তুতই ছিলাম।” তবু প্রস্তুত থাকা মানেই যে কষ্ট কম হয় তা নয়৷ “এমন পরিস্থিতিতে নিজেকে কঠোর দেখানোর চেষ্টা করবেন না। এটাই সবচেয়ে বড় ভুল। আমি পাঁচ-ছ’মাস ধরে কেঁদেছি, চিৎকার করেছি, অনুতাপে পুড়েছি। তারপর আস্তে আস্তে বেরিয়ে এসেছি।” কষ্ট সামলাতে একাধিক ‘রিবাউন্ড ডেট’-এর কথাও খোলাখুলি স্বীকার করেছেন অভিনেতা। তাঁর মতে, প্রতিটি বিচ্ছেদ ভীষণ ব্যক্তিগত। একজনের অভিজ্ঞতা দিয়ে আরেক জনের গল্প বোঝা যায় না। বিচ্ছেদকে আজও সমাজ যে কলঙ্ক ভাবে, সেই মানসিকতাকে চ্যালেঞ্জ করেই তিনি বলেছেন, “এটি কোনও অপরাধ নয়, জীবনের একটি অধ্যায় মাত্র। আমার কাছে সেই অধ্যায় এখন বন্ধ।” বিচ্ছেদের তিন বছর পর, ২০০৩ সালে, হর্ষ ছায়া বিয়ে করেন বাঙালি অভিনেত্রী সুনীতা সেনগুপ্তকে৷ অন্যদিকে, শেফালি শাহ ২০০০ সালেই বিয়ে করেন পরিচালক বিপুল অমৃতলাল শাহকে। দু’জনের দুই ছেলে — অর্যমান ও মৌর্য। শেফালি এক সাক্ষাৎকারে বলেছিলেন, “আগের সম্পর্কে নিজেকে নিঃশেষে বিলিয়ে দিয়েছিলাম। তখনই বুঝেছিলাম, আদর্শ বিয়ে বলে কিছু হয় না।” দু’জন কি আজও কথা বলেন? “না, আমরা বন্ধু নই,” বলছেন হর্ষ। “তবে কোথাও মুখোমুখি পড়ে গেলে অস্বস্তি হবে না। বহু বছর পেরিয়ে গিয়েছে। আমার কাছে সেই অধ্যায় বন্ধ।”

Георги Пеев забързва бързия интернет до 500 000 души
content: Трябва пълна координация на държавата и институциите за осигуряването на бърз интернет и по-добро мобилно покритие в цялата страна. За това се застъпи транспортният министър Георги Пеев след среща за широколентова свързаност. В срещата са участвали още представители на регионалното министерство, Изпълнителна агенция „Електронно управление“, АПИ, както и мобилни оператори. Подготвен е план с мерки и механизми за по-бърза координация между институциите. Целта е проектът да осигури високоскоростен интернет за близо 500 000 души в отдалечени и слабо населени места в страната, свързване на 185 общини към държавната мрежа и подобряване на мобилното покритие в страната. „По препоръка на министър-председателя извършваме преглед на всички стратегически проекти, включително тези с европейско финансиране. Проектът за високоскоростна свързаност е най-голямата инвестиция в цифрова инфраструктура у нас и трябва да бъде реализиран успешно“ , заяви Пеев. Очаква се министърът да постави въпросите си пред другите ресорни министри на следващи срещи в Министерския съвет.

افغانستان میں جن ٹھکانوں سے حملے ہوں گے جواب دیں گے، خواجہ آصف
content: وزیر دفاع خواجہ آصف کا کہنا ہے کہ افغانستان میں جن ٹھکانوں سے حملے ہوں گے اس کا جواب دیں گے۔ پارلیمنٹ ہاؤس کے باہر میڈیا سے گفتگو کرتے ہوئے وزیر دفاع خواجہ آصف نے کہا کہ افغانستان میں جہاں سے حملے ہورے ہیں ہمارا حق بنتا ہے کہ اس کا جواب دیں گے۔ انہوں نے کہا کہ افغان طالبان، ہندوستان کے ہاتھ میں کھیل رہے ہیں، طالبان کو ہدایت دہلی سے آتی ہیں جب تک انہیں ہندوستان ہاں نہیں کرے گا وہ کسی چیز میں حامی نہیں بھریں گے۔ یہ پڑھیں: افغانستان کی سرزمین پاکستان کے خلاف استعمال ہورہی ہے، خواجہ آصف خواجہ آصف کا کہنا تھا کہ افغان طالبان سے کہا لکھ کر دیں آپ کی سرزمین پاکستان کے خلاف استعمال نہیں ہوگی لیکن تین بار ان ملا انہوں نے میرے سامنے لکھ کر دینے سے انکار کردیا۔ وزیر دفاع نے کہا کہ افغان طالبان نے زبانی کلامی بات کی لیکن لکھ کر دینے کے لیے تیار نہیں۔ صحافی نے جب 28ویں ترمیم کے حوالے سے سوال کیا تو انہوں نے کہا کہ ایک چیز ہے ہی نہیں تو بار بار کیوں پوچھ رہے ہیں۔

الملك يفتتح جامعة المغطس الأرثوذكسية الدولية في المغطس
content: افتتح جلالة الملك عبدالله الثاني، اليوم الاثنين، جامعة المغطس الأرثوذكسية الدولية في موقع عمّاد السيد المسيح عليه السلام (المغطس)، ووجه الحكومة إلى تبني ودعم مبادرة إحياء ذكرى الألفية الثانية على معمودية السيد المسيح عام 2030، التي تقدم بها مجلس رؤساء الكنائس في الأردن. وأشار جلالته، لدى لقائه قيادات دينية مسيحية في الأردن وفلسطين في موقع عمّاد السيد المسيح (المغطس) بحضور سمو الأمير غازي بن محمد، كبير مستشاري جلالة الملك للشؤون الدينية والثقافية، المبعوث الشخصي لجلالته، إلى ضرورة أن تركز خطة تنفيذ المبادرة على تحسين البنية التحتية والخدمات التشغيلية في موقع المغطس. وأكد جلالة الملك أنه سيتابع بشكل مباشر تقدم سير العمل في خطة تنفيذ مبادرة 2030، إذ يأتي التوجيه الملكي انسجاما مع جهود جلالته في رعاية الأماكن المقدسة والحفاظ على الوجود المسيحي بالمنطقة، وتأكيدا على مكانة الأردن كموطن لأهم المواقع والمقدسات المسيحية في المنطقة والعالم. بدوره، ثمن رئيس مجلس رؤساء الكنائس في الأردن المطران خريستوفوروس عطا الله دعم جلالة الملك لمبادرة 2030، لافتا إلى أهمية وضع برامج وخطط استراتيجية بالتنسيق مع مجلس رؤساء الكنائس في الأردن. وأشار غبطة الكاردينال بيير باتيستا بيتسابالا إلى أن ذكرى الألفية الثانية على معمودية السيد المسيح عام 2030 ليست مناسبة تاريخية فحسب، بل فرصة للتأكيد على قيم الوحدة والوئام والتفاهم المشترك. وأعرب عن شكره لجلالة الملك على دعمه للمبادرة وحرصه على نشر قيم الحوار والسلام، لافتا إلى ارتباط هذه الجهود بالوصاية الهاشمية على المقدسات الإسلامية والمسيحية في القدس. وقال رئيس أساقفة الكنيسة الأنجليكانية في القدس والشرق الأوسط المطران حسام نعوم، إن مبادرة 2030 ترتكز على الإعداد المحلي من خلال تهيئة المكان وتطوير البنية والخدمات وإعداد الكوادر لاستقبال الحجاج والزائرين من داخل المملكة وخارجها. وأضاف أن المبادرة ستشمل أيضا العمل مع الكنائس والمؤسسات المسيحية في مختلف أنحاء العالم، خاصة في الغرب، للتشجيع على المشاركة في إحياء هذه الذكرى ذات البعد الروحي والتاريخي العالمي في مكانها الأصلي. وتتمحور مبادرة الألفية الثانية لمعمودية السيد المسيح عام 2030 حول عدد من المستهدفات الاستراتيجية، والتي تتضمن السردية والفعاليات الدينية الخاصة بالمناسبة، وتطوير المنتج السياحي للحج المسيحي، والترويج لموقع عمّاد السيد المسيح ومواقع السياحة الدينية الأخرى على الصعيدين الإقليمي والعالمي، وتطوير البنية التحتية والارتقاء بالخدمات التشغيلية في موقع العمّاد والمواقع الدينية والسياحية الأخرى في المملكة. وخلال افتتاح الجامعة، أشار جلالته إلى أهمية هذه الجامعة في ترسيخ رمزية موقع عمّاد السيد المسيح، والبناء على دور المملكة كنموذج للاعتدال والوئام. وجال جلالة الملك في عدد من مرافق الجامعة، وهي مؤسسة غير ربحية أسستها...

title: Florence economic development report highlights wave of retail, hotel and housing development projects
content: Florence’s first-quarter 2026 economic development report shows the city is leaning into retail expansion, hospitality projects and residential growth. The city reports more than 2,000 businesses operating in Florence and more than 700 new business applications annually. The population sits at 33,129 with a median household income of $69,112. The city’s unemployment rate was reported at 4.7% in Quarter 1, while the overall market vacancy was 5.7%. “Our city remains committed to attracting, retaining, and supporting businesses of every size and industry, recognizing that economic development is essential to maintaining a strong community and a high quality of life for our residents,” Mayor Julie Metzger-Aubuchon wrote in the report. Among the largest active commercial projects: Publix’s 55,000-square-foot grocery store at U.S. 42 and Farmview Drive remains under construction and is expected to open this summer. Total Wine & More is building its first Northern Kentucky location at 7646 Mall Road with a projected summer opening. IKEA is bringing a smaller “Plan and Order Point” concept to Mall Road, marking the company’s first NKY location. The store is expected to open this spring. Floor & Decor plans to take over the former JoAnn Fabrics space on Spiral Drive for its first Northern Kentucky store. The report also highlights continued investment in Florence’s hospitality sector, with multiple extended-stay hotel projects in the pipeline: A proposed seven-story Residence Inn near Meijer Drive would include 124 units and become one of the tallest buildings in Florence. LivSmart Studios by Hilton, Everhome Suites and Woodspring Suites are all in various stages of site review. Combined, the three projects would add 335 hotel rooms to the market. Housing development remains active as well: The Glenns at Gunpowder includes plans for roughly 284 multifamily units and 26 single-family homes following a 28-acre annexation into Florence. Avalon Square’s 135-unit townhome project is nearing completion. Parkview Senior Apartments is adding 76 senior living units on Farmview Drive. Several restaurant and quick-service concepts are also advancing, including Jaggers, Dutch Bros Coffee, Mi Cozumel and a second Florence-area 7 Brew Coffee location. Completed projects during the quarter included: High Stakes Harley-Davidson’s expanded showroom on Meijer Drive Personal Touch Home Care’s relocation from Fort Thomas New childcare centers Pathways Learning Academy and Tykes...

Samsun'da Kiracı Ev Sahibine Bıçakla Saldırdı
content: Samsun'da Bıçaklı Saldırı Olayı Samsun'un İlkadım ilçesinde ev boşaltma meselesi yüzünden meydana gelen olayda, kiracı F.Ç. (33) ev sahibi H.Y. (44)'yi bıçakla ağır yaraladı. Gece saat 04.00 sıralarında Cedit Mahallesi'nde yaşanan tartışma, kanlı bir olaya dönüştü. Olayın Gelişimi İddiaya göre, kiracı F.Ç., evin boşaltılması konusundaki tartışma sırasında ev sahibine bıçakla saldırarak sol kolu ve göğsünden yaraladı. Olayı görenlerin ihbarı üzerine hemen polis ve sağlık ekipleri olay yerine yönlendirildi. Yaralı Ev Sahibi Hastaneye Sevk Edildi Yaralı H.Y. , ambulansla Gazi Devlet Hastanesi'ne kaldırıldı. Doktorlardan alınan bilgilere göre, ev sahibinin sağlık durumu ciddiyetini koruyor. Polis Operasyonu ve Tutuklama İlkadım İlçe Emniyet Müdürlüğü Suç Önleme ve Soruşturma Büro Amirliği ekipleri, kiracı F.Ç. ile olay sırasında yanında bulunan T.D. (36)'yi gözaltına aldı. Emniyetteki işlemlerinin ardından bu iki şahıs, Samsun Adliyesi'ne sevk edildi. Nöbetçi Sulh Ceza Hakimliği'nde ifadeleri alınan şüpheliler, tutuklananarak Samsun T Tipi Kapalı Cezaevi'ne gönderildi. SAMSUN’UN İLKADIM İLÇESİNDE EV BOŞALTMA MESELESİ NEDENİYLE ÇIKAN TARTIŞMADA EV SAHİBİNİ BIÇAKLA AĞIR YARALAYAN KİRACI İLE YANINDAKİ ARKADAŞI ÇIKARILDIKLARI MAHKEMECE TUTUKLANDI.

title: Google Messages takes first step towards RCS video calls
content: TL;DR The RCS Universal Profile 4.0 announced support for cross-platform video calls. Google Messages currently supports video calls though ViLTE and Meet. In its latest beta, Messages adds a new string explicitly referencing RCS video calls. It’s almost hard to believe that we’re still finding new ways to improve messaging in 2026 — you’d think we would have gotten it pretty nailed down by now. But even after RCS arrived to start modernizing how we text, the addition of more and more new features keeps us excited about the next big upgrade waiting for us. A couple months back, the publication of the RCS Universal Profile 4.0 laid the groundwork for cross-platform RCS video calls , and now we already may be seeing the early signs of Google Messages building out support. Authority Insights You're reading an Authority Insights story. Subscribe to our new Authority Insights newsletter for more exclusive reports, app teardowns, leaks, and in-depth tech coverage you won't find anywhere else. sign up now By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Use and acknowledge the data practices in our Privacy Policy. You may unsubscribe at any time. Let’s get one thing very clear here, early on: That “may be” is doing a lot of heavy lifting, and right now we really don’t have any clear sense for just how functional these recent changes are. But even without the full picture, we’re still excited to see Messages acknowledging RCS video calls.

content: Lemon Lens ได้เปิดตัวแพลตฟอร์ม Data & Social Intelligence อย่างเป็นทางการ ภายใต้แนวคิด Know the Future เพราะการจะมองอนาคตออก ต้องอ่านปัจจุบันให้ขาด โดยงานนี้ได้นําเอานักธุรกิจชื่อดังระดับแถวหน้าของประเทศไทยมาร่วมแชร์มุมมองเกี่ยวกับการใช้ KOL และ Influencer ในการขับเคลื่อนธุรกิจยุคใหม่ ที่มีมุมมองว่า ซึ่งในงานนี้นักแสดงหนุ่ม ลี-ฐานัฐพ์ โล่คุณสมบัติ ก็มาได้ร่วมแชร์ประสบการณ์เกี่ยวกับการใช้ Social Media เพื่อสื่อสารกับแฟนคลับในปัจจุบัน โดยมองว่า “แพลตฟอร์มออนไลน์เป็นอีกหนึ่งช่องทางสําคัญที่ช่วยให้แฟน ๆ ได้รู้จักตัวตนของศิลปินอย่างใกล้ชิดมากยิ่งขึ้น ซึ่งเทคโนโลยีมันก้าวไปข้างหน้าทุกวัน การใช้ Social Media ก็จะช่วยให้แฟน ๆ ได้ใกล้ชิดตัวเองมากขึ้น เพราะบางคนไม่สามารถตามไปตามงานอีเวนต์ หรือสถานที่ต่าง ๆ ได้ การที่เรามาโพสต์ รีวิว หรือ ไลฟ์ใน Social Media ก็จะได้เป็นการเชื่อมสัมพันธ์กับแฟน ๆ ได้อีกหนึ่งทาง” Lemon Lens จัดเป็นอีกหนึ่งแพลตฟอร์มที่ล้ําสมัย ที่วิเคราะห์กลุ่มเป้าหมายได้อย่างแม่นยํา ด้วยการใช้ Data, Algorithm และ Ai เจาะได้อย่างตรงจุด หรือขอข้อมูลเพิ่มได้ที่ www.lemonlensai.com The post Lemon Lens ดึง ‘ลี ฐานัฐพ์’ เปิดตัวแพลตฟอร์มออนไลน์สุดล้ํา appeared first on .

Teknik Üniversiteler Birliği 4. Olağan Toplantısı Erzurum'da Yapıldı
content: Teknik Üniversiteler Birliği 4. Toplantısı Başarıyla Gerçekleştirildi Teknik Üniversiteler Birliği’nin (TÜB) 4. olağan toplantısı, Erzurum Teknik Üniversitesi (ETÜ) ev sahipliğinde düzenlendi. Toplantıda üniversiteler arası iş birliği, bilimsel araştırma ve altyapı kullanımı konuları üzerinde duruldu. Katılımcılar ve Gündem Maddeleri ETÜ Rektörü Prof. Dr. Bülent Çakmak ’ın liderliğinde gerçekleştirilen toplantıya, çeşitli üniversitelerin rektörleri katıldı. Bu isimler arasında Prof. Dr. Naci Çağlar (Bursa Teknik Üniversitesi), Prof. Dr. Adnan Özcan (Eskişehir Teknik Üniversitesi) ve Prof. Dr. Hasan Mandal (İstanbul Teknik Üniversitesi) gibi önemli akademik figürler yer aldı. Toplantının ana gündem maddeleri arasında, TÜB ortak eğitim faaliyetlerinin gözden geçirilmesi, Bilimsel Araştırma Projeleri (BAP) kapsamında 2026 yılı için planlar, araştırma altyapılarının ortak kullanımı ve TÜB Kod Ağı Birliği Projesi ’nin mevcut durumu yer aldı. Önemli Açıklamalar Toplantıda bir konuşma yapan Prof. Dr. Bülent Çakmak, TÜB'ün yükseköğretim alanında stratejik bir platform haline geldiğini vurguladı. "Birliğimiz, üniversiteler arasında bilgi ve deneyim paylaşımını güçlendiren önemli bir yapıdır. 2026 BAP süreçleri, ortak eğitim faaliyetleri ve dijital dönüşüm, üniversitelerimizin birlikte hareket etmesi gereken kritik alanlardır," diyerek, ortak hareket etmenin gerekliliğine dikkat çekti. Toplantı, gündem maddelerine ilişkin değerlendirmelerin ardından sona erdi. TEKNİK ÜNİVERSİTELER BİRLİĞİ’NİN (TÜB) 4. OLAĞAN TOPLANTISI, ERZURUM TEKNİK ÜNİVERSİTESİ (ETÜ) EV SAHİPLİĞİNDE GERÇEKLEŞTİRİLDİ.

Matrix Asset Management Increased Its Holdings in Microsoft Corporation (MSFT)
content: Matrix Asset Advisors , an asset management company, released its Q1 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here . In the first quarter of 2026, the stock market declined by -4.33% after three years of gains, initially lifted by strong earnings and expectations of interest rate cuts. However, following military actions in Iran on February 28, rising oil prices, higher interest rates, and heightened economic uncertainty lowered stock prices. Technology, Consumer Discretionary, and Financials were the sectors with the lowest quarterly performance. The top-performing sectors were consumer staples, utilities, and energy. Despite these challenges, Matrix’s portfolios performed relatively well, with the Dividend Income portfolio achieving a small positive return and the LCV portfolio outpacing the S&P 500®. The firm continued its cautious optimism for 2026 and believes the current volatile environment presents significant investment opportunities. In addition, please check the Fund’s top five holdings to know its best picks in 2026. In its first-quarter 2026 investor letter, Matrix Asset Advisors highlighted stocks like Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT ). Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) is a multinational software company that develops and supports software, services, devices, and solutions, holding dominant positions in software, cloud infrastructure, generative AI, and gaming. On May 15, 2026, Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) stock closed at $421.92 per share. One-month return of Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) was 0.11%, and its shares lost 8.80% over the past 52 weeks. Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) has a market capitalization of $3.11 trillion. Matrix Asset Advisors stated the following regarding Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) in its Q1 2026 investor letter: "We think the market’s decline this year provided some very good investment opportunities. While the overall market was down less than 5% in the quarter, many individual stocks had much bigger pullbacks. Of note was the decline in the software technology area, where fears of AI disrupting software business models led to an across-the-board selloff in the sector, including Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) (down 24% in the quarter), which we believe will continue to show good growth as more businesses adopt AI. We view the decline in Microsoft’s stock as an excellent buying opportunity." Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) ranks second on our list of 40...

EN VIVO | Caso Sinohydro: se reinstala el cuarto día del juicio contra Moreno y otros 20 procesados
content: El Tribunal de Juzgamiento de la Corte Nacional de Justicia retoma este lunes 18 de mayo el cuarto día de audiencia de juicio del caso Sinohydro , proceso en el que la Fiscalía acusa a 21 personas por presunto cohecho, entre ellas al expresidente Lenín Moreno. La diligencia se reinstaló a las 09:00, luego de una suspensión de varios días. Justicia Caso Sinohydro: la audiencia de juicio se reinstalará Mónica Jara Chérrez ¿De qué trata el caso Sinohydro, según la Fiscalía? Según la teoría fiscal, entre 2008 y 2018 operó una estructura que habría canalizado pagos irregulares a cambio de favorecer contratos públicos . La acusación sostiene que el supuesto esquema habría movilizado alrededor de 76 millones de dólares en sobornos. En el proceso también están vinculados familiares del exmandatario y otras personas señaladas como autores y cómplices. La Fiscalía acusa a siete personas como autores directos y a catorce como cómplices. ¿Qué pasó la semana pasada? La tercera jornada terminó el pasado 13 de mayo con testimonios, informes periciales y debates sobre la incorporación de pruebas. La audiencia fue suspendida hasta este lunes, cuando el tribunal reanudó la diligencia para continuar con la fase probatoria. Justicia Huecos en el juicio del caso Sinohydro Sara Ortiz Lo que dejó la audiencia antes de la suspensión Fiscalía presentó pericias y testimonios para sostener la acusación, pero aún no han presentado pruebas de pagos indebidos. La Defensa de Moreno insiste en rechazar las acusaciones y sostiene que no existió participación del exmandatario en la adjudicación de la obra a Sinohydro. El juicio se proyecta que durará varias semanas debido al volumen de pruebas y testimonios. 09:57 18/05/2026 Fiscalía presenta a sus testigos 10:03 18/05/2026 10:03 18/05/2026 La jornada se desarrolla en la Corte Nacional de Justicia, en Quito, donde el fiscal general encargado, Carlos Alarcón, continúa con la exposición de pruebas contra los procesados. El caso investiga una presunta trama de corrupción relacionada con la adjudicación y financiamiento del proyecto hidroeléctrico Coca Codo Sinclair a la empresa Sinohydro. Para este lunes, la Fiscalía llamó como testigo al perito en inspección ocular técnica José Luis Ramírez Ramos, quien verificó los indicios incautados en los allanamientos a las oficinas de Recorsa y Novatex, dos empresas de la familia de Conto Patiño. En su testimonio indicó que en los allanamientos...

Belarus launches joint drills with Russia to practice nuclear weapons use
Belarus launches joint drills with Russia to practice nuclear weapons use
content: Belarus said Monday it launched joint drills with Russia to practice the use of nuclear weapons that Moscow has deployed on the territory of its neighbor and ally. Belarus’ authoritarian President Alexander Lukashenko has allowed Russia to deploy some of its tactical nuclear weapons to his country. In December, Russia also announced that its latest intermediate range nuclear-capable Oreshnik missile system entered service in Belarus, which borders Ukraine and NATO members Poland, Latvia and Lithuania. The Belarusian Defense Ministry said that the drills will involve missile units and warplanes. “During the exercise, in cooperation with the Russian side, it is planned to practice the delivery of nuclear weapons and preparations for their use,” the ministry said in a statement. It said the drills will focus on training forces to move covertly across large distances. It said the maneuvers had been planned in advance and weren’t aimed against any third countries. Lukashenko has ruled the nation of 9.5 million with an iron fist for more than three decades. His government has been repeatedly sanctioned by the West for its crackdown on human rights and for allowing Moscow to use its territory for the invasion of Ukraine in February 2022. In 2024, the Kremlin released a revised nuclear doctrine that placed Belarus under the Russian nuclear umbrella. Russian President Vladimir Putin has said that Moscow will retain control of its nuclear weapons deployed to Belarus, but would allow its ally to select the targets in case of conflict. Russia has used a conventionally armed version of the Oreshnik — Russian for hazelnut tree — to strike facilities in Ukraine on two occasions — in November 2024 and then again in January. Putin has claimed that Oreshnik’s multiple warheads plunge at speeds of up to Mach 10 and can’t be intercepted, and that several such missiles used in a conventional strike could be as devastating as a nuclear attack. Intermediate-range missiles can fly between 500 to 5,500 kilometers (310 to 3,400 miles). Such weapons were banned under a Soviet-era treaty that Washington and Moscow abandoned in 2019. Belarusian opposition leader Sviatlana Tsikhanouskaya criticized the drills, saying that the deployment of Russian nuclear weapons has “turned Belarus into a target.” “Lukashenko has turned Belarus into a platform for Russian threats, but Belarusians don’t need these weapons,” Tsikhanouskaya told The Associated Press. “Only a free Belarus will become a...

Finance Minister, WB team review economic reform priorities
content: F.P. Report ISLAMABAD: Federal Minister for Finance and Revenue, Muhammad Aurangzeb, met with a delegation from the World Bank (WB), led by Bolormaa Amgaabazar at the Finance Division to review Pakistan’s economic reform agenda and discuss key development and fiscal priorities. According to a press release, the Finance Minister appreciated the World Bank’s continued engagement with Pakistan on economic reforms and institutional development. He acknowledged the World Bank’s support across key reform areas and emphasized the importance of close coordination and technical collaboration to support implementation of the government’s economic priorities and reform agenda. The meeting reviewed progress on a range of ongoing reform initiatives and technical assistance programs being supported by the World Bank, including public financial management reforms, institutional capacity building, debt management, and private sector development. Discussions also covered implementation time-lines, coordination mechanisms, and operational arrangements relating to various reform-linked initiatives and technical support programs. The minister emphasized the importance of ensuring that technical assistance programs remain focused, specialized, and aligned with clearly defined reform objectives. He underlined the government’s preference for high-quality international expertise, practical implementation support, and knowledge transfer aimed at strengthening institutional capacity within the public sector. He further noted the importance of developing sustainable in-house expertise and enhancing the government’s ability to independently manage and implement complex reform initiatives over time. Discussions also focused on the government’s ongoing efforts to transform the Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) through reforms centered around people, processes, and technology. The Finance Minister highlighted progress being made in automation, digitization, simplification of procedures, and technology-driven monitoring systems and he reiterated that the government remained fully committed to the broader tax administration transformation agenda and institutional modernization efforts. The World Bank team shared updates regarding its ongoing technical support relating to the Medium-Term Revenue Strategy (MTRS), Tax Policy Office (TPO), and FBR transformation initiatives. Both sides exchanged views on strengthening coordination, accelerating implementation, and ensuring that reform measures...

NVIDIA Price Target Lifted to $300 by KeyBanc: Blackwell and Rubin Are Stacking Catalysts
content: The post NVIDIA Price Target Lifted to $300 by KeyBanc: Blackwell and Rubin Are Stacking Catalysts appeared first on 24/7 Wall St. . Quick Read KeyBanc raised NVIDIA’s (NVDA) price target to $300 from $275 with an Overweight rating, citing Blackwell and Rubin as stacking catalysts ahead of May earnings. KeyBanc’s upgrade positions Rubin as a near-term catalyst in anticipation of NVIDIA’s May 20 earnings report rather than a distant opportunity, reinforcing the company’s dominance in AI infrastructure spending despite competitive threats from hyperscaler custom chips. The analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks. Get them here FREE . NVIDIA ( NASDAQ:NVDA ) just picked up another bullish data point from Wall Street. KeyBanc raised its price target on NVIDIA to $300 from $275, maintaining an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm’s thesis: Blackwell and Rubin are stacking catalysts heading into the May 20 earnings report. For long-term holders, the price target raise reinforces a narrative that has driven NVIDIA stock to a $5.46 trillion market cap and a 19% year-to-date (YTD) gain. The bull case rests on a multi-quarter Blackwell ramp, an early Rubin contribution, and a China H200 wild card that could meaningfully extend the cycle. This analyst upgrade arrives two days before NVIDIA reports its fiscal Q1 2027 results, where consensus calls for $78 billion in revenue and $1.77 EPS. The KeyBanc note frames the print as a setup for sustained upside rather than a one-quarter event. Ticker Company Firm Action Old Rating New Rating Old Target New Target NVDA NVIDIA KeyBanc Price target raised Overweight Overweight $275 $300 The Analyst’s Case KeyBanc expects NVIDIA to deliver strong results and guidance driven by several upside catalysts. The firm sees Blackwell GPU shipments rising by 150,000 to 200,000 quarter-over-quarter, adding an estimated $5 billion to $7 billion in revenue. On the next platform, initial Rubin revenue of $3 billion to $4 billion is included in the outlook, with improving HBM4 supply supporting Rubin GPU shipments of 1.7 million to 1.8 million units this year. The wild card is geopolitics: China H200 approvals could represent $13 billion to $14 billion in potential revenue, though KeyBanc expects management to exclude this from guidance while still outlining the possible impact. Morena prohíbe al alcalde de Chignahuapan presumir lujos en redes y eventos públicos
content: La Comisión Nacional de Honestidad y Justicia (CNHJ) de Morena impuso medidas cautelares contra el alcalde de Chignahuapan , Juan Rivera Trejo , al prohibirle utilizar redes sociales y medios de comunicación para exhibir actos relacionados con lujo, ostentación o dispendio económico , mientras avanza el procedimiento interno que enfrenta dentro del partido. El expediente CNHJ-PUE-236/2026 , emitido el pasado 15 de mayo, establece restricciones inmediatas contra el edil poblano luego de la polémica generada por el festejo realizado el 9 de mayo en la exclusiva Hacienda de Atlamaxac , evento que desató críticas por presuntos excesos y contradicciones con los principios de austeridad republicana promovidos por Morena. Las imágenes difundidas en plataformas digitales mostraron una celebración con decoraciones florales monumentales , techos completamente cubiertos de flores, enormes candelabros y un amplio grupo de chambelanes, elementos que provocaron inconformidad entre militantes y ciudadanos. De acuerdo con la resolución interna, la CNHJ consideró que dichas acciones proyectaron una percepción de frivolidad, privilegio y derroche , afectando la credibilidad y reputación pública del partido. Además, el órgano partidista subrayó que estas conductas vulneran los principios del llamado humanismo mexicano impulsado por Morena. Como parte de las medidas preventivas, el presidente municipal tiene prohibido organizar, promover o difundir actos públicos o privados considerados ostentosos. También se le restringe el uso de redes sociales para proyectar conductas alejadas de la sobriedad institucional que exige el movimiento a sus funcionarios. The post Morena prohíbe al alcalde de Chignahuapan presumir lujos en redes y eventos públicos appeared first on Diario 24 Horas Puebla .

title: Serdal Adalı, Şenol Güneş iddialarına son noktayı koydu!
content: AJANSSPOR-HABER Beşiktaş Kulübü Başkanı Serdal Adalı, Ümraniye Nevzat Demir Tesisleri’nde açıklamalarda bulundu. Adalı; Sergen Yalçın'ın ayrılığı, Şenol Güneş iddiaları ve Serkan Reçber'in geleceği hakkında da konuştu. "Sergen Hoca ile yolları ayırdık" Sergen Yalçın'ın ayrılığı hakkında konuşan Adalı, "Öğle saatlerinde Sergen Hoca ile bir araya geldik. Kötü bir sezon geçirdik. Önümüzdeki sene de bu tepkiler olacak. Sergen Hoca'da önümüzdeki sene bu tepkileri karşılayacak göğüs gerecek şey olmadı. Dolayısıyla da karşılıklı olarak konuştuk yollarımızı ayırdık. "Aklımın ucundan geçmiyordu" Bir şeyden vazgeçecek değiliz. Biz bunu başaracağız; başarmak mecburiyetindeyiz. Biz mücadeleye devam edeceğiz. Samimi söylüyorum, öğleye kadar ayrılık aklımın ucundan geçmiyordu. Hoca, önümüzdeki sene gelecek tepkilere kendini hazır hissetmedi. "Çok kısa zamanda bir teknik direktörümüz olacak" Çok kısa zamanda bir teknik direktörümüz olacak. Şu andan itibaren de çalışmalarımız başladı, kimse merak etmesin. Sergen Yalçın tazminat istemedi Hoca hiçbir şekilde tazminat istemedi, hatta haziran ayındaki maaşını da istemedi. Mayıs maaşını zaten ödeyeceğiz. Ekibine ben teşekkür ettim onlara bir şeyler yapacağız. Helalleşeceğiz ve ayrılacağız. "Serkan Reçber'le konuşacağız" Serkan Reçber de aylardır çalışıyor. En azından çalışmalarını bir göreyim, ondan sonra oturup konuşacağız. Hoca yerli mi yabancı mı olacak? Şu ana kadar yabancı mı olur, yerli mi olur samimi söylüyorum, bakmadım. Hoca buradayken birini aramamız bize yakışan bir şey değil. "Şenol Güneş'le çalışmayı düşünmüyorum" Şenol Güneş iddialarına da yanıt veren Adalı, "Ben Şenol Hoca’yı çok severim, beraber de çalıştık. Ama Sergen Hoca’dan sonra ben Şenol Hoca ile çalışmayı düşünmüyorum. Yazıp çiziyorlar, Şenol Hoca’ya da ayıp etmesinler" diyerek sözlerini tamamladı.

title: Woman found dead after fall from 17th-floor condo in KK
content: KOTA KINABALU: A woman was found dead after she is believed to have fallen from the 17th floor of a condominium along Jalan 18 here this evening. The incident occurred about 6.30pm. The victim, believed to be in her 50s, was found at the base of the building by condominium staff. Sources said the woman was believed to have fallen from the 17th floor, although the circumstances surrounding the incident remained under investigation. A team from the Kota Kinabalu district police headquarters, together with officers from the local police station, was deployed to the scene following a report. Personnel from the Sabah police contingent forensic unit were also present to assist investigations. The victim's body was later taken to Queen Elizabeth Hospital for a post-mortem examination. © New Straits Times Press (M) Bhd

title: Two Military Jets Collide in Midair at Idaho Air Show
content: Crew members of two U.S. Navy planes ejected after their jets collided in midair on Sunday afternoon during an air show at the Mountain Home Air Force Base in Idaho, according to the base. The episode happened shortly after noon local time when the jets, EA-18G Growlers, collided during a demonstration. The jets had a total of four crew members aboard, all of whom successfully ejected, according to the base, which added that they were being medically evaluated. A video on social media showed the jets spinning toward the ground. The four crew members deployed their parachutes and ejected from the planes, which then exploded into balls of fire. “They crashed in an unpopulated area off base,” said a witness, Lindsay Dressler. She said a brush fire broke out after the crash. The “aircraft incident” took place 2 miles northwest of the base, the Mountain Home Air Force Base Gunfighters said on Facebook. The base is home to the Air Force’s 366th Fighter Wing, also known as the Gunfighters. The base, in southwestern Idaho about 50 miles south of Boise, the state capital, was locked down on Sunday afternoon. A spokesperson for the Federal Aviation Administration referred inquiries to the Mountain Home Air Force Base. The planes in the collision were EA-18G Growler Airborne Electronic Attack Aircraft, according to the base and the Navy. The planes were assigned to the show from Whidbey Island, Washington. The EA-18G Growler is part of the Navy’s “first line of defense in hostile environments,” according to its website. It is used by the VAQ-130 squadron, the oldest electronic warfare squadron in the Navy, known as the Zappers. In April, the 366th Fighter Wing at the Idaho base announced the Gunfighter Skies Air Show, which began on Saturday and had been scheduled to run through Sunday. The free, public event featured the U.S. Air Force Thunderbirds, the Mountain Home Air Force Base said in a news release. “Gunfighter Skies will showcase the precision, capability and readiness of the U.S. Air Force,” the base said. The base is home to about 8,600 people, including service members and their families. Mountain Home Police said the show was canceled and urged people to avoid the area around the base. Robert Robinson, 26, was driving to the event with his wife when the crash happened. “All of a sudden, we saw the full profile of one of the planes,” he said. “I was like, that’s either a cool stunt or something major just happened.” He said it took him several minutes to...

Dimissioni durante il periodo di prova, la Cassazione cambia tutto: ecco cosa succede
content: La normativa vigente stabilisce che le dimissioni del rapporto di lavoro devono essere effettuate, pena di inefficacia, esclusivamente con modalità telematica utilizzando apposito modello messo a disposizione dal Ministero del Lavoro . Le dimissioni presentate con altre forme, in modalità cartacea o verbale, non producono alcun effetto legale se non vengono confermate tramite la procedura online obbligatoria, le dimissioni online. La procedura telematica era stata introdotta al fine di arginare il fenomeno delle “dimissioni in bianco” e per garantire la genuinità della volontà del lavoratore. Il diritto di revoca entro sette giorni Inoltre, il lavoratore ha la facoltà di revocare le proprie dimissioni entro i sette giorni successivi, cosicché il rapporto di lavoro continua a sussistere in applicazione del diritto di ripensamento del lavoratore. In tal caso il rapporto di lavoro si ricostituisce e il datore di lavoro è tenuto a consentire il completamento della prova. I casi esclusi dalla procedura online Esistono casi di esclusione alla procedura telematica per le dimissioni stabiliti dalla Circolare n. 12/2016 del Ministero del Lavoro tra cui le dimissioni dal rapporto di lavoro domestico, quelle intervenute nelle cosidette “sedi protette”, le dimissioni durante il periodo di prova, le dimissioni e le risoluzioni consensuali dal rapporto di lavoro presentate dalla lavoratrice durante il periodo di gravidanza e entro i primi tre anni di vita del bambino e le dimissioni nel rapporto di lavoro marittimo. Dimissioni durante il periodo di prova Dunque, durante il periodo di prova il lavoratore può dimettersi senza seguire la procedura online delle dimissioni online e può anche revocare le stesse entro il termine dei sette giorni successivi. Revoca delle dimissioni e ripristino del rapporto Di conseguenza, se il lavoratore revoca le dimissioni, queste si considerano come mai avvenute, il rapporto di lavoro si ripristina e il datore di lavoro ha l’obbligo di riammettere il dipendente in servizio per consentirgli di terminare il periodo di prova rimanente, con la conseguenza che tale principio non può essere sostituito dalla erogazione di una indennità risarcitoria correlata al periodo residuo. Ovviamente, il ripristino del rapporto di lavoro non esclude la possibilità al datore di lavoro di recedere dal contratto al termine del periodo di prova o entro un termine congruo idoneo a valutare la capacità del lavoratore neoassunto finalizzata ad un...
